```
63: const progressColorMap: Record<GooeyToastPhase, string> = {
64:   loading: styles.progressInfo,
65:   default: styles.progressDefault,
66:   success: styles.progressSuccess,
67:   error: styles.progressError,
68:   warning: styles.progressWarning,
69:   info: styles.progressInfo,
70: }
71: 
72: const PH = 34 // pill height constant
73: const DEFAULT_DISPLAY_DURATION = 4000
74: 
75: // Squish spring config — scales mass with morph duration so feel stays consistent
76: // bounce 0.0 = heavily damped (subtle), 0.8 = very bouncy (dramatic)
77: const DEFAULT_EXPAND_DUR = 0.6
78: const DEFAULT_COLLAPSE_DUR = 0.9
79: function squishSpring(durationSec: number, defaultDur: number, bounce = 0.4) {
80:   const scale = durationSec / defaultDur
81:   // Map bounce (0-0.8) to stiffness (200-550) and damping (24-8)
82:   const stiffness = 200 + bounce * 437.5
83:   const damping = 24 - bounce * 20
84:   const mass = 0.7 * scale
85:   return { type: 'spring' as const, stiffness, damping, mass }
86: }
87: 
88: /**
89:  * Singleton MutationObserver registry — one observer per <ol> element shared
90:  * across all GooeyToast instances mounted under that list. Each toast registers
91:  * its own callback; the shared observer batches mutations via rAF and invokes
92:  * every registered callback once per frame.
93:  */
94: const observerRegistry = new Map<Element, {
95:   observer: MutationObserver
96:   callbacks: Set<() => void>
97: }>()
98: 
99: function registerSonnerObserver(ol: Element, callback: () => void) {
100:   let entry = observerRegistry.get(ol)
101:   if (!entry) {
102:     const callbacks = new Set<() => void>()
103:     let applying = false
104:     const observer = new MutationObserver(() => {
105:       if (applying) return
106:       applying = true
107:       requestAnimationFrame(() => {
108:         callbacks.forEach(cb => cb())
109:         requestAnimationFrame(() => { applying = false })
110:       })
111:     })
112:     observer.observe(ol, {
113:       attributes: true,
114:       attributeFilter: ['style', 'data-visible'],
115:       subtree: true,
116:       childList: true,
117:     })
118:     entry = { observer, callbacks }
119:     observerRegistry.set(ol, entry)
120:   }
121:   entry.callbacks.add(callback)
122:   return () => {
123:     entry!.callbacks.delete(callback)
124:     if (entry!.callbacks.size === 0) {
125:       entry!.observer.disconnect()
126:       observerRegistry.delete(ol)
127:     }
128:   }
129: }
130: 
131: /**
132:  * Recalculates CSS variables on all sibling toast <li> elements.
133:  *
134:  * Sonner measures height once on mount (~34px pill) and never re-measures
135:  * toast.custom() content. This function corrects --initial-height and --offset
136:  * so our morphing toasts stack correctly.
137:  *
138:  * When expanded (hovered), CSS transitions on [data-expanded="true"] are
139:  * overridden (GooeyToast.css) so writing these values takes effect instantly.
140:  *
141:  * DOM order: oldest toast at index 0, newest (front) at index n-1.
142:  * Front toast has --offset: 0; each older toast accumulates the heights of all
143:  * newer toasts plus the gap between them.
144:  */
145: function syncSonnerHeights(
146:   wrapperEl: HTMLElement | null,
147:   includeOffsets = false,
148: ) {
149:   if (!wrapperEl) return
150:   const li = wrapperEl.closest('[data-sonner-toast]') as HTMLElement | null
151:   if (!li?.parentElement) return
152: 
153:   const ol = li.parentElement
154:   const toasts = Array.from(
155:     ol.querySelectorAll(':scope > [data-sonner-toast]')
156:   ) as HTMLElement[]
157: 
158:   if (toasts.length === 0) return
159: 
160:   // Measure actual rendered height of each toast's content wrapper.
161:   // Invisible toasts (beyond Sonner's visibleToasts limit) get height 0
162:   // so they don't create a gap in the layout or affect offset calculations.
163:   const heights = toasts.map(t => {
164:     if (t.getAttribute('data-visible') === 'false') return 0
165:     const content = t.firstElementChild as HTMLElement | null
166:     const h = content ? content.getBoundingClientRect().height : 0
167:     return h > 0 ? h : PH
168:   })
169: 
170:   // When expanded (hovered), temporarily kill CSS transitions so offset
171:   // corrections apply in this paint — prevents overlap flash. The CSS shortens
172:   // transitions to 150ms (GooeyToast.css) for Sonner's own changes, but our
173:   // corrections must be truly instant since getBoundingClientRect above forces
174:   // a layout that "locks in" stale values.
175:   const isExpanded = includeOffsets && toasts[0]?.getAttribute('data-expanded') === 'true'
176:   if (isExpanded) {
177:     for (const t of toasts) t.style.setProperty('transition', 'none', 'important')
178:   }
179: 
180:   // Always update --initial-height (the CSS height transition target).
181:   for (let i = 0; i < toasts.length; i++) {
182:     toasts[i].style.setProperty('--initial-height', `${heights[i]}px`)
183:   }
184: 
185:   if (!includeOffsets) {
186:     if (isExpanded) {
187:       for (const t of toasts) t.style.removeProperty('transition')
188:     }
189:     return
190:   }
191: 
192:   const gapStr = getComputedStyle(ol).getPropertyValue('--gap').trim()
193:   const gap = parseFloat(gapStr) || 14
194: 
195:   let runningOffset = 0
196:   for (let i = toasts.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
197:     // Invisible toasts: collapse to base position, don't contribute to offset
198:     if (toasts[i].getAttribute('data-visible') === 'false') {
199:       toasts[i].style.setProperty('--offset', '0px')
200:       continue
201:     }
202:     toasts[i].style.setProperty('--offset', `${runningOffset}px`)
203:     if (i > 0) {
204:       runningOffset += heights[i] + gap
205:     }
206:   }
207: 
208:   if (isExpanded) {
209:     // Force reflow so browser applies corrected values without transitions,
210:     // then restore transitions for Sonner's own future animations.
211:     void ol.offsetHeight
212:     for (const t of toasts) t.style.removeProperty('transition')
213:   }
214: }
215: 
216: /**
217:  * Simple last-result cache for pure functions called every animation frame.
218:  * Avoids recomputing the SVG path string when flush() is called multiple
219:  * times with identical parameters (e.g. syncSonnerHeights after morph update).
220:  */
221: function memoizePath(fn: (pw: number, bw: number, th: number, t: number) => string) {
222:   let lastArgs: [number, number, number, number] | null = null
223:   let lastResult = ''
224:   return (pw: number, bw: number, th: number, t: number): string => {
225:     if (lastArgs && lastArgs[0] === pw && lastArgs[1] === bw && lastArgs[2] === th && lastArgs[3] === t) {
226:       return lastResult
227:     }
228:     lastResult = fn(pw, bw, th, t)
229:     lastArgs = [pw, bw, th, t]
230:     return lastResult
231:   }
232: }
233: 
234: /**
235:  * Parametric morph path: pill lobe stays constant, body grows from underneath.
236:  * t=0 → pure pill, t=1 → full organic blob.
237:  */
238: function morphPathRaw(pw: number, bw: number, th: number, t: number): string {
239:   const pr = PH / 2
240:   const pillW = Math.min(pw, bw)
241: 
242:   const bodyH = PH + (th - PH) * t
243: 
244:   // Pure pill when t is zero or body too small for proper rounded corners
245:   if (t <= 0 || bodyH - PH < 8) {
246:     return [
247:       `M 0,${pr}`,
248:       `A ${pr},${pr} 0 0 1 ${pr},0`,
249:       `H ${pillW - pr}`,
250:       `A ${pr},${pr} 0 0 1 ${pillW},${pr}`,
251:       `A ${pr},${pr} 0 0 1 ${pillW - pr},${PH}`,
252:       `H ${pr}`,
253:       `A ${pr},${pr} 0 0 1 0,${pr}`,
254:       `Z`,
255:     ].join(' ')
256:   }
257: 
258:   const curve = 14 * t
259:   const cr = Math.min(16, (bodyH - PH) * 0.45)
260:   const bodyW = pillW + (bw - pillW) * t
261:   const bodyTop = PH - curve
262:   const qEndX = Math.min(pillW + curve, bodyW - cr)
263: 
264:   return [
265:     `M 0,${pr}`,
266:     `A ${pr},${pr} 0 0 1 ${pr},0`,
267:     `H ${pillW - pr}`,
268:     `A ${pr},${pr} 0 0 1 ${pillW},${pr}`,
269:     `L ${pillW},${bodyTop}`,
270:     `Q ${pillW},${bodyTop + curve} ${qEndX},${bodyTop + curve}`,
271:     `H ${bodyW - cr}`,
272:     `A ${cr},${cr} 0 0 1 ${bodyW},${bodyTop + curve + cr}`,
273:     `L ${bodyW},${bodyH - cr}`,
274:     `A ${cr},${cr} 0 0 1 ${bodyW - cr},${bodyH}`,
275:     `H ${cr}`,
276:     `A ${cr},${cr} 0 0 1 0,${bodyH - cr}`,
277:     `Z`,
278:   ].join(' ')
279: }
280: 
281: /**
282:  * Centered morph path: pill centered on top, body grows symmetrically below.
283:  * t=0 → pure pill (centered), t=1 → full blob with pill centered on top.
284:  */
285: function morphPathCenterRaw(pw: number, bw: number, th: number, t: number): string {
286:   const pr = PH / 2
287:   const pillW = Math.min(pw, bw)
288: 
289:   // Pill is ALWAYS centered at the final body width position
290:   const pillOffset = (bw - pillW) / 2
291: 
292:   // Pure pill when t is zero or body too small
293:   if (t <= 0 || PH + (th - PH) * t - PH < 8) {
294:     return [
295:       `M ${pillOffset},${pr}`,
296:       `A ${pr},${pr} 0 0 1 ${pillOffset + pr},0`,
297:       `H ${pillOffset + pillW - pr}`,
298:       `A ${pr},${pr} 0 0 1 ${pillOffset + pillW},${pr}`,
299:       `A ${pr},${pr} 0 0 1 ${pillOffset + pillW - pr},${PH}`,
300:       `H ${pillOffset + pr}`,
301:       `A ${pr},${pr} 0 0 1 ${pillOffset},${pr}`,
302:       `Z`,
303:     ].join(' ')
304:   }
305: 
306:   const bodyH = PH + (th - PH) * t
307:   const curve = 14 * t
308:   const cr = Math.min(16, (bodyH - PH) * 0.45)
309:   const bodyTop = PH - curve
310: 
311:   // Body grows symmetrically outward from pill center
312:   const bodyCenter = bw / 2
313:   const halfBodyW = (pillW / 2) + ((bw - pillW) / 2) * t  // grows from pillW/2 to bw/2
314:   const bodyLeft = bodyCenter - halfBodyW
315:   const bodyRight = bodyCenter + halfBodyW
316: 
317:   // Q curve endpoints: body edges meet pill edges with organic curves
318:   const qLeftX = Math.max(bodyLeft + cr, pillOffset - curve)
319:   const qRightX = Math.min(bodyRight - cr, pillOffset + pillW + curve)
320: 
321:   return [
322:     // Start at left side of pill
323:     `M ${pillOffset},${pr}`,
324:     // Pill top-left arc
325:     `A ${pr},${pr} 0 0 1 ${pillOffset + pr},0`,
326:     // Top edge of pill
327:     `H ${pillOffset + pillW - pr}`,
328:     // Pill top-right arc
329:     `A ${pr},${pr} 0 0 1 ${pillOffset + pillW},${pr}`,
330:     // Right side down to body junction
331:     `L ${pillOffset + pillW},${bodyTop}`,
332:     // Right organic curve from pill to body
333:     `Q ${pillOffset + pillW},${bodyTop + curve} ${qRightX},${bodyTop + curve}`,
334:     // Right side of body
335:     `H ${bodyRight - cr}`,
336:     // Body top-right corner
337:     `A ${cr},${cr} 0 0 1 ${bodyRight},${bodyTop + curve + cr}`,
338:     // Right edge down
339:     `L ${bodyRight},${bodyH - cr}`,
340:     // Body bottom-right corner
341:     `A ${cr},${cr} 0 0 1 ${bodyRight - cr},${bodyH}`,
342:     // Bottom edge
343:     `H ${bodyLeft + cr}`,
344:     // Body bottom-left corner
345:     `A ${cr},${cr} 0 0 1 ${bodyLeft},${bodyH - cr}`,
346:     // Left edge up
347:     `L ${bodyLeft},${bodyTop + curve + cr}`,
348:     // Body top-left corner
349:     `A ${cr},${cr} 0 0 1 ${bodyLeft + cr},${bodyTop + curve}`,
350:     // Left side of body
351:     `H ${qLeftX}`,
352:     // Left organic curve from body to pill
353:     `Q ${pillOffset},${bodyTop + curve} ${pillOffset},${bodyTop}`,
354:     // Close back to start
355:     `Z`,
356:   ].join(' ')
357: }
358: 
359: const morphPath = memoizePath(morphPathRaw)
360: const morphPathCenter = memoizePath(morphPathCenterRaw)
361: 
362: // Smooth easing curve for non-spring animations
363: const SMOOTH_EASE = [0.4, 0, 0.2, 1] as const
364: 
365: export const GooeyToast: FC<GooeyToastProps> = ({
366:   title,
367:   description,
368:   action,
369:   icon,
370:   phase,
371:   classNames,
372:   fillColor: fillColorProp,
373:   borderColor,
374:   borderWidth,
375:   timing,
376:   preset,
377:   spring: springProp,
378:   bounce: bounceProp,
379:   showTimestamp = true,
380:   showProgress: showProgressProp,
381:   toastId,
382: }) => {
383:   const theme = getGooeyTheme()
384:   const closeButtonSetting = getGooeyCloseButton()
385:   const showCloseButton = closeButtonSetting !== false
386:   const fillColor = fillColorProp ?? (theme === 'dark' ? '#1a1a1a' : '#ffffff')
387:   const position = getGooeyPosition()
388:   const dir = getGooeyDir()
389:   const posIsRight = position?.includes('right') ?? false
390:   const isCenter = position?.includes('center') ?? false
391:   // In RTL, left-positioned toasts visually behave like right-positioned ones and vice versa
392:   const isRight = dir === 'rtl' ? (isCenter ? false : !posIsRight) : posIsRight
393:   const prefersReducedMotion = usePrefersReducedMotion()
394:   // Explicit props > per-toast preset > global context values > defaults
395:   const presetConfig = preset ? animationPresets[preset] : undefined
396:   const useSpring = springProp ?? presetConfig?.spring ?? getGooeySpring()
397:   const bounceVal = bounceProp ?? presetConfig?.bounce ?? getGooeyBounce() ?? 0.4
398:   const showProgress = showProgressProp ?? getGooeyShowProgress()
399: 
400:   // Action success override state
401:   const [actionSuccess, setActionSuccess] = useState<string | null>(null)
402:   const [dismissing, setDismissing] = useState(false)
403:   // Counter to remount progress bar on re-expand, restarting the CSS animation
404:   const [progressKey, setProgressKey] = useState(0)
405:   const [hovered, setHovered] = useState(false)
406:   const hoveredRef = useRef(false)
407:   // Container-level hover (hovering anywhere in the Sonner stack, not just this toast)
408:   const containerHoveredRef = useRef(getContainerHovered())
409:   const [containerHovered, setContainerHoveredState] = useState(getContainerHovered())
410:   const collapsingRef = useRef(false)
411:   const preDismissRef = useRef(false)
412:   const collapseEndTime = useRef(0)
413:   const expandedDimsRef = useRef({ pw: 0, bw: 0, th: 0 })
414:   const dismissTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null>(null)
415: 
416:   // Effective values (overridden when action success is active)
417:   const effectiveTitle = actionSuccess ?? title
418:   const effectivePhase: GooeyToastPhase = actionSuccess ? 'success' : phase
419:   const effectiveDescription = actionSuccess ? undefined : description
420:   const effectiveAction = actionSuccess ? undefined : action
421: 
422:   const isLoading = effectivePhase === 'loading'
423:   const hasDescription = Boolean(effectiveDescription)
424:   const hasAction = Boolean(effectiveAction)
425:   const isExpanded = (hasDescription || hasAction) && !dismissing
426: 
427:   const [showBody, setShowBody] = useState(false)
428: 
429:   // DOM refs
430:   const wrapperRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
431:   const pathRef = useRef<SVGPathElement>(null)
432:   const headerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
433:   const contentRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
434: 
435:   // Animation controllers
436:   const morphCtrl = useRef<ReturnType<typeof animate> | null>(null)
437:   const pillResizeCtrl = useRef<ReturnType<typeof animate> | null>(null)
438:   const headerSquishCtrl = useRef<ReturnType<typeof animate> | null>(null)
439: 
440:   // Animated state (not React state — avoids re-renders during animation)
441:   const morphTRef = useRef(0)
442:   const aDims = useRef({ pw: 0, bw: 0, th: 0 }) // animated dims
443:   const dimsRef = useRef({ pw: 0, bw: 0, th: 0 }) // latest measured dims
444: 
445:   // React state for dims (triggers effects)
446:   const [dims, setDims] = useState({ pw: 0, bw: 0, th: 0 })
447:   useEffect(() => { dimsRef.current = dims }, [dims])
448: 
449:   // Subscribe to container-level hover so timers pause when hovering anywhere in the stack
450:   useEffect(() => {
451:     return subscribeContainerHovered((h) => {
452:       containerHoveredRef.current = h
453:       setContainerHoveredState(h)
454:     })
455:   }, [])
456: 
457:   // Push current animated state to SVG DOM + constrain wrapper/content
458:   // NOTE: We intentionally do NOT set style.height on the wrapper.
459:   // The content's maxHeight constrains the rendered height, and letting
460:   // the wrapper derive its height naturally allows Sonner to accurately
461:   // measure the toast height for stacking/positioning.
462:   const flush = useCallback(() => {
463:     const { pw: p, bw: b, th: h } = aDims.current
464:     if (p <= 0 || b <= 0 || h <= 0) return
465:     // Clamp t to [0,1] — spring overshoot past 1 or below 0 must not
466:     // cause flush to toggle between constraint branches (jitter).
467:     const t = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, morphTRef.current))
468:     // Read position and dir fresh each call so flush never uses a stale value
469:     const pos = getGooeyPosition()
470:     const d = getGooeyDir()
471:     const centerPos = pos?.includes('center') ?? false
472:     const posRight = pos?.includes('right') ?? false
473:     // In RTL, flip left/right visual behavior (center stays the same)
474:     const rightSide = d === 'rtl' ? (centerPos ? false : !posRight) : posRight
475:     // Center positions: always use morphPathCenter so pill stays at fixed center offset
476:     // (switching to morphPath at t=0 causes a frame where content jumps left)
477:     if (centerPos) {
478:       const centerBw = Math.max(dimsRef.current.bw, expandedDimsRef.current.bw, p)
479:       pathRef.current?.setAttribute('d', morphPathCenter(p, centerBw, h, t))
480:     } else {
481:       pathRef.current?.setAttribute('d', morphPath(p, b, h, t))
482:     }
483: 
484:     if (t >= 1) {
485:       // Fully expanded: clear all constraints
486:       if (wrapperRef.current) {
487:         wrapperRef.current.style.width = ''
488:       }
489:       if (contentRef.current) {
490:         contentRef.current.style.width = ''
491:         contentRef.current.style.overflow = ''
492:         contentRef.current.style.maxHeight = ''
493:         contentRef.current.style.clipPath = ''
494:       }
495:     } else if (t > 0) {
496:       // Morphing: lock content at final target width + clip-path (prevents text reflow)
497:       const targetBw = dimsRef.current.bw
498:       const targetTh = dimsRef.current.th
499:       const pillW = Math.min(p, b)
500:       const currentW = pillW + (b - pillW) * t
501:       const currentH = PH + (targetTh - PH) * t
502:       // Center: use stable full width (dimsRef may shrink during collapse)
503:       const centerFullW = centerPos ? Math.max(dimsRef.current.bw, expandedDimsRef.current.bw, p) : 0
504:       if (wrapperRef.current) {
505:         wrapperRef.current.style.width = (centerPos ? centerFullW : currentW) + 'px'
506:       }
507:       if (contentRef.current) {
508:         // Center: content width = wrapper width so textAlign:center keeps header aligned with SVG pill
509:         contentRef.current.style.width = (centerPos ? centerFullW : targetBw) + 'px'
510:         contentRef.current.style.overflow = 'hidden'
511:         contentRef.current.style.maxHeight = currentH + 'px'
512:         if (centerPos) {
513:           const clip = (centerFullW - currentW) / 2
514:           contentRef.current.style.clipPath = `inset(0 ${clip}px 0 ${clip}px)`
515:         } else {
516:           const clip = targetBw - currentW
517:           contentRef.current.style.clipPath = rightSide
518:             ? `inset(0 0 0 ${clip}px)`
519:             : `inset(0 ${clip}px 0 0)`
520:         }
521:       }
522:     } else {
523:       // Compact: constrain to pill dimensions
524:       const pillW = Math.min(p, b)
525:       if (wrapperRef.current) {
526:         // Center: keep body width so pill SVG offset stays consistent (no frame jump)
527:         const centerBw = centerPos ? Math.max(dimsRef.current.bw, expandedDimsRef.current.bw, p) : pillW
528:         wrapperRef.current.style.width = centerBw + 'px'
529:       }
530:       if (contentRef.current) {
531:         if (centerPos) {
532:           // Keep content locked at body width with symmetric clip to match SVG pill position
533:           const centerBwVal = Math.max(dimsRef.current.bw, expandedDimsRef.current.bw, p)
534:           contentRef.current.style.width = centerBwVal + 'px'
535:           const clip = (centerBwVal - pillW) / 2
536:           contentRef.current.style.clipPath = `inset(0 ${clip}px 0 ${clip}px)`
537:         } else {
538:           contentRef.current.style.width = ''
539:           contentRef.current.style.clipPath = ''
540:         }
541:         contentRef.current.style.overflow = 'hidden'
542:         contentRef.current.style.maxHeight = PH + 'px'
543:       }
544:     }
545:   }, [])
546: 
547:   // Measure content dimensions (clear all constraints first for accurate reading)
548:   const measure = useCallback(() => {
549:     if (!headerRef.current || !contentRef.current) return
550:     const wr = wrapperRef.current
551:     const savedW = wr?.style.width ?? ''
552:     const savedOv = contentRef.current.style.overflow
553:     const savedMH = contentRef.current.style.maxHeight
554:     const savedCW = contentRef.current.style.width
555:     if (wr) { wr.style.width = '' }
556:     contentRef.current.style.overflow = ''
557:     contentRef.current.style.maxHeight = ''
558:     contentRef.current.style.width = ''
559: 
560:     const cs = getComputedStyle(contentRef.current)
561:     const paddingX = parseFloat(cs.paddingLeft) + parseFloat(cs.paddingRight)
562:     const pw = headerRef.current.offsetWidth + paddingX
563:     const bw = contentRef.current.offsetWidth
564:     const th = contentRef.current.offsetHeight
565: 
566:     if (wr) { wr.style.width = savedW }
567:     contentRef.current.style.overflow = savedOv
568:     contentRef.current.style.maxHeight = savedMH
569:     contentRef.current.style.width = savedCW
570: 
571:     dimsRef.current = { pw, bw, th }
572:     setDims({ pw, bw, th })
573:   }, [])
574: 
575:   // Measure on prop changes (useLayoutEffect prevents flash of unconstrained content)
576:   useIsomorphicLayoutEffect(() => {
577:     measure()
578:     const t = setTimeout(measure, 100)
579:     return () => clearTimeout(t)
580:   }, [effectiveTitle, effectivePhase, isExpanded, showBody, effectiveDescription, effectiveAction, measure])
581: 
582:   useEffect(() => {
583:     if (!contentRef.current) return
584:     const ro = new ResizeObserver(measure)
585:     ro.observe(contentRef.current)
586:     return () => ro.disconnect()
587:   }, [measure])
588: 
589:   const { pw, bw, th } = dims
590:   const hasDims = pw > 0 && bw > 0 && th > 0
591: 
592:   // Squish animation controller (shared between landing + blob squish)
593:   const blobSquishCtrl = useRef<ReturnType<typeof animate> | null>(null)
594: 
595:   // Landing squish: single smooth boing — spring scales with user timing
596:   const expandDur = DEFAULT_EXPAND_DUR
597:   const collapseDur = DEFAULT_COLLAPSE_DUR
598:   const lastSquishTime = useRef(0)
599:   const triggerLandingSquish = useCallback((phase: 'expand' | 'collapse' | 'mount' = 'mount') => {
600:     if (!wrapperRef.current || prefersReducedMotion) return
601:     // Skip squish entirely when spring is disabled
602:     if (!useSpring) return
603:     const now = Date.now()
604:     if (now - lastSquishTime.current < 300) return
605:     lastSquishTime.current = now
606:     blobSquishCtrl.current?.stop()
607:     const el = wrapperRef.current
608:     const springConfig = phase === 'collapse'
609:       ? squishSpring(collapseDur, DEFAULT_COLLAPSE_DUR, bounceVal)
610:       : squishSpring(expandDur, DEFAULT_EXPAND_DUR, bounceVal)
611:     // Softer squish on collapse — blob is wider so same % looks more drastic
612:     // Scale squish intensity with bounce (0.05=subtle, 0.8=dramatic)
613:     const bScale = bounceVal / 0.4
614:     const compressY = (phase === 'collapse' ? 0.035 : 0.12) * bScale
615:     const expandX = (phase === 'collapse' ? 0.018 : 0.06) * bScale
616:     blobSquishCtrl.current = animate(0, 1, {
617:       ...springConfig,
618:       onUpdate: (v) => {
619:         const intensity = Math.sin(v * Math.PI)
620:         const sy = 1 - compressY * intensity
621:         const sx = 1 + expandX * intensity
622:         const mirror = el.style.transform?.includes('scaleX(-1)') ? 'scaleX(-1) ' : ''
623:         // Anchor squish at pill (top of blob) so body feels like it expands from pill center
624:         el.style.transformOrigin = 'center top'
625:         el.style.transform = mirror + `scaleX(${sx}) scaleY(${sy})`
626:       },
627:       onComplete: () => {
628:         const right = el.style.transform?.includes('scaleX(-1)')
629:         el.style.transform = right ? 'scaleX(-1)' : ''
630:         el.style.transformOrigin = ''
631:       },
632:     })
633:   }, [prefersReducedMotion, expandDur, collapseDur, useSpring, bounceVal])
634: 
635:   // Handle dims changes: pill resize animation (compact) or direct update (expanded)
636:   useIsomorphicLayoutEffect(() => {
637:     if (!hasDims || collapsingRef.current) return
638: 
639:     const prev = { ...aDims.current }
640:     const target = { pw, bw, th }
641: 
642:     // First render — set immediately
643:     if (prev.bw <= 0) {
644:       aDims.current = target
645:       flush()
646:       return
647:     }
648: 
649:     // During morph animation — just update target dims, morph callback reads them
650:     if (morphTRef.current > 0 && morphTRef.current < 1) {
651:       aDims.current = target
652:       flush()
653:       return
654:     }
655: 
656:     // Expanded and settled (morph done) — update immediately
657:     if (showBody) {
658:       aDims.current = target
659:       flush()
660:       return
661:     }
662: 
663:     // Compact mode: animate pill resize smoothly
664:     if (prev.bw === target.bw && prev.pw === target.pw && prev.th === target.th) return
665: 
666:     if (prefersReducedMotion) {
667:       aDims.current = target
668:       flush()
669:       return
670:     }
671: 
672:     pillResizeCtrl.current?.stop()
673:     // Fire vertical squish alongside the horizontal resize
674:     // Skip if recently collapsed or about to expand (promise resolve/reject)
675:     if (Date.now() - collapseEndTime.current > 500 && !isExpanded) {
676:       triggerLandingSquish('expand')
677:     }
678:     const pillResizeTransition = useSpring
679:       ? { type: 'spring' as const, duration: 0.5, bounce: bounceVal * 0.875 }
680:       : { duration: 0.4, ease: SMOOTH_EASE }
681:     pillResizeCtrl.current = animate(0, 1, {
682:       ...pillResizeTransition,
683:       onUpdate: (t) => {
684:         aDims.current = {
685:           pw: prev.pw + (target.pw - prev.pw) * t,
686:           bw: prev.bw + (target.bw - prev.bw) * t,
687:           th: prev.th + (target.th - prev.th) * t,
688:         }
689:         flush()
690:       },
691:     })
692:   }, [pw, bw, th, hasDims, showBody, flush, prefersReducedMotion, triggerLandingSquish, useSpring])
693: 
694:   // Squish on entry: only for simple toasts (no body text) — expanded toasts get squish from showBody
695:   const squishDelayMs = 45
696:   const mountSquished = useRef(false)
697:   useEffect(() => {
698:     if (hasDims && !mountSquished.current && !isExpanded) {
699:       mountSquished.current = true
700:       const t = setTimeout(triggerLandingSquish, squishDelayMs)
701:       return () => clearTimeout(t)
702:     }
703:   }, [hasDims, squishDelayMs, triggerLandingSquish])
704: 
705:   // Squish on expand (showBody false→true) — collapse squish is fired directly in morph code
706:   // Skip squish on hover re-expand (hovered + was dismissing) to avoid jarring bounce
707:   const prevShowBody = useRef(false)
708:   useIsomorphicLayoutEffect(() => {
709:     if (!prevShowBody.current && showBody && !hoveredRef.current) {
710:       // Small delay after morph starts for more satisfying "settle then bounce" feel
711:       const t = setTimeout(() => triggerLandingSquish('expand'), 80)
712:       return () => clearTimeout(t)
713:     }
714:     prevShowBody.current = showBody
715:   }, [showBody, triggerLandingSquish])
716: 
717:   // Error shake: quick horizontal shake when phase transitions to error (not during dismiss)
718:   const shakeCtrl = useRef<ReturnType<typeof animate> | null>(null)
719:   const prevPhase = useRef(phase)
720:   useEffect(() => {
721:     if (phase === 'error' && prevPhase.current !== 'error' && !dismissing && wrapperRef.current && !prefersReducedMotion) {
722:       shakeCtrl.current?.stop()
723:       const el = wrapperRef.current
724:       const mirror = el.style.transform?.includes('scaleX(-1)') ? 'scaleX(-1) ' : ''
725:       shakeCtrl.current = animate(0, 1, {
726:         duration: 0.4,
727:         ease: 'easeOut',
728:         onUpdate: (v) => {
729:           const decay = 1 - v
730:           const shake = Math.sin(v * Math.PI * 6) * decay * 3
731:           el.style.transform = mirror + `translateX(${shake}px)`
732:         },
733:         onComplete: () => {
734:           el.style.transform = mirror.trim() || ''
735:         },
736:       })
737:     }
738:     prevPhase.current = phase
739:     return () => { shakeCtrl.current?.stop() }
740:   }, [phase, dismissing, prefersReducedMotion])
741: 
742:   // Phase 1: expand (delay showBody) or collapse (reverse morph)
743:   useEffect(() => {
744:     if (isExpanded) {
745:       const delay = prefersReducedMotion ? 0 : (330)
746:       const t1 = setTimeout(() => setShowBody(true), delay)
747:       return () => clearTimeout(t1)
748:     }
749: 
750:     morphCtrl.current?.stop()
751:     pillResizeCtrl.current?.stop()
752: 
753:     // Reverse morph if currently expanded
754:     if (morphTRef.current > 0) {
755:       // Compute target compact pill dims from current header content
756:       const csPad = contentRef.current ? getComputedStyle(contentRef.current) : null
757:       const padX = csPad ? parseFloat(csPad.paddingLeft) + parseFloat(csPad.paddingRight) : 20
758:       const targetPw = headerRef.current ? headerRef.current.offsetWidth + padX : aDims.current.pw
759:       const targetDims = { pw: targetPw, bw: targetPw, th: PH }
760: 
761:       if (prefersReducedMotion) {
762:         morphTRef.current = 0
763:         collapsingRef.current = false
764:         preDismissRef.current = false
765:         setShowBody(false)
766:         aDims.current = { ...targetDims }
767:         flush()
768:         return
769:       }
770: 
771:       const savedDims = expandedDimsRef.current.bw > 0
772:         ? { ...expandedDimsRef.current }
773:         : { ...aDims.current }
774: 
775:       const isPreDismiss = preDismissRef.current
776:       const collapseDur = 0.9
777:       // Use easing when spring is disabled or during pre-dismiss
778:       const collapseTransition = (isPreDismiss || !useSpring)
779:         ? { duration: collapseDur, ease: SMOOTH_EASE }
780:         : { type: 'spring' as const, duration: collapseDur, bounce: bounceVal * 0.875 }
781: 
782:       // Fire squish immediately as collapse begins — don't wait for morph to finish
783:       triggerLandingSquish('collapse')
784: 
785:       morphCtrl.current = animate(morphTRef.current, 0, {
786:         ...collapseTransition,
787:         onUpdate: (t) => {
788:           morphTRef.current = t
789:           aDims.current = {
790:             pw: targetDims.pw + (savedDims.pw - targetDims.pw) * t,
791:             bw: targetDims.bw + (savedDims.bw - targetDims.bw) * t,
792:             th: targetDims.th + (savedDims.th - targetDims.th) * t,
793:           }
794:           flush()
795:           syncSonnerHeights(wrapperRef.current, true)
796:         },
797:         onComplete: () => {
798:           morphTRef.current = 0
799:           collapsingRef.current = false
800:           preDismissRef.current = false
801:           collapseEndTime.current = Date.now()
802:           aDims.current = { ...targetDims }
803:           flush()
804:           syncSonnerHeights(wrapperRef.current, true)
805:           setShowBody(false)
806:         },
807:       })
808:       return () => { morphCtrl.current?.stop() }
809:     }
810: 
811:     setShowBody(false)
812:     morphTRef.current = 0
813:     flush()
814:   }, [isExpanded, flush, prefersReducedMotion, useSpring, triggerLandingSquish])
815: 
816:   // Pre-dismiss collapse: shrink back to pill before Sonner removes the toast
817:   // Hover pauses the timer. On unhover, timer restarts with remaining time.
818:   const remainingRef = useRef<number | null>(null)
819:   const timerStartRef = useRef(0)
820:   const progressDelayRef = useRef(0)
821:   useEffect(() => {
822:     if (!showBody || actionSuccess || dismissing) return
823: 
824:     const expandDelayMs = prefersReducedMotion ? 0 : (330)
825:     const collapseMs = prefersReducedMotion ? 10 : ((0.9) * 1000)
826:     const displayMs = timing?.displayDuration ?? DEFAULT_DISPLAY_DURATION
827:     const fullDelay = displayMs - expandDelayMs - collapseMs
828:     progressDelayRef.current = Math.max(fullDelay, 0)
829:     if (fullDelay <= 0) return
830: 
831:     // Don't start timer while hovered (individual or container) — pause and resume on unhover
832:     if (hoveredRef.current || containerHoveredRef.current) return
833: 
834:     const delay = remainingRef.current ?? fullDelay
835:     timerStartRef.current = Date.now()
836: 
837:     const timer = setTimeout(() => {
838:       // Guard: hover refs update synchronously (before React re-renders),
839:       // so check them to avoid starting collapse when user just hovered.
840:       if (hoveredRef.current || containerHoveredRef.current) {
841:         const elapsed = Date.now() - timerStartRef.current
842:         remainingRef.current = Math.max(0, delay - elapsed)
843:         return
844:       }
845:       remainingRef.current = null
846:       expandedDimsRef.current = { ...aDims.current }
847:       collapsingRef.current = true
848:       preDismissRef.current = true
849:       setDismissing(true)
850:     }, delay)
851:     dismissTimerRef.current = timer
852: 
853:     return () => {
854:       clearTimeout(timer)
855:       // Save remaining time when cleaning up (e.g. hover started)
856:       const elapsed = Date.now() - timerStartRef.current
857:       const remaining = delay - elapsed
858:       if (remaining > 0 && (hoveredRef.current || containerHoveredRef.current)) {
859:         remainingRef.current = remaining
860:       }
861:     }
862:   }, [showBody, actionSuccess, dismissing, prefersReducedMotion, hovered, containerHovered])
863: 
864:   // Re-expand on hover: if collapsed/collapsing and user hovers (individual or container), reverse it
865:   const canExpand = hasDescription || hasAction
866:   const reExpandingRef = useRef(false)
867:   useEffect(() => {
868:     if ((!hovered && !containerHovered) || !canExpand || !dismissing) return
869:     // Stop collapse morph, reset state
870:     morphCtrl.current?.stop()
871:     collapsingRef.current = false
872:     preDismissRef.current = false
873:     remainingRef.current = null
874:     reExpandingRef.current = true
875:     setDismissing(false)
876:     setShowBody(true)
877:     // Remount the progress bar so the CSS animation restarts from full width
878:     if (showProgress) setProgressKey(k => k + 1)
879: 
880:     // Directly drive the expand morph from current position
881:     // Can't rely on Phase 2 because showBody might already be true (mid-collapse hover)
882:     const currentT = morphTRef.current
883:     const startDims = { ...aDims.current }
884:     const morphExpandTransition = useSpring
885:       ? { type: 'spring' as const, duration: 0.9, bounce: bounceVal }
886:       : { duration: 0.6, ease: SMOOTH_EASE }
887: 
888:     // Wait one frame for measure to update dimsRef with expanded content
889:     requestAnimationFrame(() => {
890:       morphCtrl.current = animate(currentT, 1, {
891:         ...morphExpandTransition,
892:         onUpdate: (t) => {
893:           morphTRef.current = t
894:           const target = dimsRef.current
895:           aDims.current = {
896:             pw: startDims.pw + (target.pw - startDims.pw) * t,
897:             bw: startDims.bw + (target.bw - startDims.bw) * t,
898:             th: startDims.th + (target.th - startDims.th) * t,
899:           }
900:           flush()
901:           // Keep offsets in sync as heights grow so toasts don't overlap mid-morph.
902:           // During initial expand, expandObs handles this, but during re-expand the
903:           // heights start at mid-collapse values and offsets go stale without this.
904:           syncSonnerHeights(wrapperRef.current, true)
905:         },
906:         onComplete: () => {
907:           morphTRef.current = 1
908:           aDims.current = { ...dimsRef.current }
909:           reExpandingRef.current = false
910:           flush()
911:           syncSonnerHeights(wrapperRef.current, true)
912:         },
913:       })
914:     })
915: 
916:     return () => { morphCtrl.current?.stop() }
917:   }, [hovered, containerHovered, dismissing, canExpand])
918: 
919:   // Dismiss from Sonner after collapse completes.
920:   // Re-expand calls setDismissing(false) → effect cleanup cancels this timer.
921:   // But there's a narrow race: user hovers AFTER showBody=false but BEFORE
922:   // React processes the re-expand state update. Guard with refs (synchronously
923:   // set on mouseenter) so dismiss is always skipped if cursor is on the stack.
924:   useEffect(() => {
925:     if (!toastId || !dismissing || showBody) return
926:     const t = setTimeout(() => {
927:       if (!hoveredRef.current && !containerHoveredRef.current) {
928:         sonnerToast.dismiss(toastId)
929:       }
930:     }, 800)
931:     return () => clearTimeout(t)
932:   }, [dismissing, showBody, toastId])
933: 
934:   // Dismiss after action success morph-back completes
935:   useEffect(() => {
936:     if (!toastId || !actionSuccess || showBody) return
937:     const t = setTimeout(() => sonnerToast.dismiss(toastId), 1200)
938:     return () => clearTimeout(t)
939:   }, [toastId, actionSuccess, showBody])
940: 
941:   // Phase 2: morph from pill → blob
942:   useEffect(() => {
943:     // Skip if re-expand is driving the morph
944:     if (reExpandingRef.current) return
945:     if (!showBody) {
946:       morphTRef.current = 0
947:       morphCtrl.current?.stop()
948:       flush()
949:       return
950:     }
951: 
952:     if (prefersReducedMotion) {
953:       pillResizeCtrl.current?.stop()
954:       morphCtrl.current?.stop()
955:       morphTRef.current = 1
956:       aDims.current = { ...dimsRef.current }
957:       flush()
958:       syncSonnerHeights(wrapperRef.current, true)
959:       return
960:     }
961: 
962:     const raf = requestAnimationFrame(() => {
963:       pillResizeCtrl.current?.stop()
964:       morphCtrl.current?.stop()
965:       // Capture current animated dims so we interpolate smoothly from
966:       // wherever the pill resize left off instead of snapping to target.
967:       const startDims = { ...aDims.current }
968:       const morphExpandTransition = useSpring
969:         ? { type: 'spring' as const, duration: 0.9, bounce: bounceVal }
970:         : { duration: 0.6, ease: SMOOTH_EASE }
971:       morphCtrl.current = animate(0, 1, {
972:         ...morphExpandTransition,
973:         onUpdate: (t) => {
974:           morphTRef.current = t
975:           const target = dimsRef.current
976:           aDims.current = {
977:             pw: startDims.pw + (target.pw - startDims.pw) * t,
978:             bw: startDims.bw + (target.bw - startDims.bw) * t,
979:             th: startDims.th + (target.th - startDims.th) * t,
980:           }
981:           flush()
982:           syncSonnerHeights(wrapperRef.current, true)
983:         },
984:         onComplete: () => {
985:           morphTRef.current = 1
986:           aDims.current = { ...dimsRef.current }
987:           flush()
988:           syncSonnerHeights(wrapperRef.current, true)
989:         },
990:       })
991:     })
992: 
993:     return () => {
994:       cancelAnimationFrame(raf)
995:       morphCtrl.current?.stop()
996:     }
997:   }, [showBody, flush, prefersReducedMotion, useSpring])
998: 
999:   // Header elastic squish: spring down when expanding, spring back once on collapse/dismiss
1000:   const headerSquished = useRef(false)
1001:   useEffect(() => {
1002:     if (!headerRef.current || prefersReducedMotion) return
1003:     headerSquishCtrl.current?.stop()
1004:     const el = headerRef.current
1005: 
1006:     if (showBody && !dismissing && !actionSuccess) {
1007:       // Skip header squish when spring is disabled
1008:       if (!useSpring) return
1009:       // Squish down with elastic spring — scaled to expand timing
1010:       headerSquished.current = true
1011:       headerSquishCtrl.current = animate(0, 1, {
1012:         ...squishSpring(expandDur, DEFAULT_EXPAND_DUR, bounceVal),
1013:         onUpdate: (v) => {
1014:           const scale = 1 - 0.05 * v
1015:           const pushY = v * 1
1016:           el.style.transform = `scale(${scale}) translateY(${pushY}px)`
1017:         },
1018:       })
1019:     } else if (headerSquished.current) {
1020:       // Spring back to normal — match morph transition type
1021:       headerSquished.current = false
1022:       // Use easing when spring is disabled or during pre-dismiss
1023:       const isSpringCollapse = !preDismissRef.current && useSpring
1024:       const transition = isSpringCollapse
1025:         ? squishSpring(collapseDur, DEFAULT_COLLAPSE_DUR, bounceVal)
1026:         : { duration: collapseDur * 0.5, ease: SMOOTH_EASE }
1027:       headerSquishCtrl.current = animate(1, 0, {
1028:         ...transition,
1029:         onUpdate: (v) => {
1030:           const scale = 1 - 0.05 * v
1031:           const pushY = v * 1
1032:           el.style.transform = `scale(${scale}) translateY(${pushY}px)`
1033:         },
1034:         onComplete: () => {
1035:           el.style.transform = ''
1036:         },
1037:       })
1038:     }
1039: 
1040:     return () => { headerSquishCtrl.current?.stop() }
1041:   }, [showBody, dismissing, actionSuccess, prefersReducedMotion, expandDur, collapseDur, useSpring])
1042: 
1043:   // Keep Sonner's toast stacking in sync when it re-renders (e.g. hover expand/collapse).
1044:   // Sonner overwrites --offset/--initial-height with stale values from its React state,
1045:   // so we observe style mutations on the toast list and re-apply correct heights.
1046:   // Uses a shared singleton observer per <ol> to avoid N observers for N toasts.
1047:   useEffect(() => {
1048:     const wrapper = wrapperRef.current
1049:     if (!wrapper) return
1050:     const ol = wrapper.closest('[data-sonner-toast]')?.parentElement
1051:     if (!ol) return
1052: 
1053:     // Per-rAF sync: corrects --initial-height AND --offset every time Sonner
1054:     // overwrites them with stale values from its React state.
1055:     // When expanded, CSS transitions are disabled (GooeyToast.css) so corrections
1056:     // apply instantly without re-targeting a CSS transition mid-flight.
1057:     const unregister = registerSonnerObserver(ol, () => {
1058:       syncSonnerHeights(wrapper, true)
1059:     })
1060: 
1061:     // Immediate sync when Sonner expands the stack (data-expanded → true).
1062:     // MutationObserver callbacks are microtasks — they run before the next paint,
1063:     // so --offset is corrected before the first CSS transition frame renders.
1064:     const expandObs = new MutationObserver((mutations) => {
1065:       for (const m of mutations) {
1066:         if (
1067:           m.type === 'attributes' &&
1068:           m.attributeName === 'data-expanded' &&
1069:           (m.target as HTMLElement).getAttribute('data-expanded') === 'true'
1070:         ) {
1071:           syncSonnerHeights(wrapper, true)
1072:           break
1073:         }
1074:       }
1075:     })
1076:     expandObs.observe(ol, {
1077:       attributes: true,
1078:       attributeFilter: ['data-expanded'],
1079:       subtree: true,
1080:     })
1081: 
1082:     return () => {
1083:       unregister()
1084:       expandObs.disconnect()
1085:     }
1086:   }, [])
1087: 
1088:   // Action button handler
1089:   const handleActionClick = useCallback(() => {
1090:     if (!effectiveAction) return
1091:     if (effectiveAction.successLabel) {
1092:       // Save expanded dims synchronously before onClick (which may throw)
1093:       expandedDimsRef.current = { ...aDims.current }
1094:       collapsingRef.current = true
1095:       setActionSuccess(effectiveAction.successLabel)
1096:     }
1097:     try { effectiveAction.onClick() } catch { /* onClick errors shouldn't block morph-back */ }
1098:   }, [effectiveAction])
1099: 
1100:   // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
1101:   // Swipe-to-dismiss touch gesture
1102:   // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
1103:   const SWIPE_THRESHOLD = 100
1104:   const swipeStartRef = useRef<{ x: number; y: number } | null>(null)
1105:   const [swipeOffsetX, setSwipeOffsetX] = useState(0)
1106:   const isSwipingRef = useRef(false)
1107: 
1108:   const handleTouchStart = useCallback((e: React.TouchEvent) => {
1109:     if (!getGooeySwipeToDismiss()) return
1110:     const touch = e.touches[0]
1111:     swipeStartRef.current = { x: touch.clientX, y: touch.clientY }
1112:     isSwipingRef.current = false
1113:   }, [])
1114: 
1115:   const handleTouchMove = useCallback((e: React.TouchEvent) => {
1116:     if (!swipeStartRef.current || !getGooeySwipeToDismiss()) return
1117:     const touch = e.touches[0]
1118:     const dx = touch.clientX - swipeStartRef.current.x
1119:     const dy = touch.clientY - swipeStartRef.current.y
1120: 
1121:     // If vertical movement is dominant, cancel swipe tracking
1122:     if (!isSwipingRef.current && Math.abs(dy) > Math.abs(dx) && Math.abs(dy) > 10) {
1123:       swipeStartRef.current = null
1124:       return
1125:     }
1126: 
1127:     // Lock into horizontal swipe once threshold is met
1128:     if (!isSwipingRef.current && Math.abs(dx) > 10) {
1129:       isSwipingRef.current = true
1130:     }
1131: 
1132:     if (isSwipingRef.current) {
1133:       setSwipeOffsetX(dx)
1134:     }
1135:   }, [])
1136: 
1137:   const handleTouchEnd = useCallback(() => {
1138:     if (!getGooeySwipeToDismiss()) {
1139:       swipeStartRef.current = null
1140:       return
1141:     }
1142:     if (isSwipingRef.current && Math.abs(swipeOffsetX) >= SWIPE_THRESHOLD && toastId) {
1143:       sonnerToast.dismiss(toastId)
1144:     }
1145:     swipeStartRef.current = null
1146:     isSwipingRef.current = false
1147:     setSwipeOffsetX(0)
1148:   }, [swipeOffsetX, toastId])
1149: 
1150:   // Compute swipe visual feedback
1151:   const swipeOpacity = swipeOffsetX !== 0
1152:     ? Math.max(0, 1 - Math.abs(swipeOffsetX) / (SWIPE_THRESHOLD * 1.5))
1153:     : 1
1154:   const swipeTranslate = swipeOffsetX !== 0 ? `translateX(${swipeOffsetX}px)` : ''
1155: 
1156:   const renderIcon = () => {
1157:     if (!actionSuccess && icon) return icon
1158:     if (isLoading) return <SpinnerIcon size={18} className={styles.spinnerSpin} />
1159:     const IconComponent = phaseIconMap[effectivePhase]
1160:     return <IconComponent size={18} />
1161:   }
1162: 
1163:   const iconTransition = useMemo(
1164:     () => prefersReducedMotion ? { duration: 0.01 } : { duration: 0.2 },
1165:     [prefersReducedMotion],
1166:   )
1167:   const iconEl = (
1168:     <div className={`${styles.iconWrapper}${classNames?.icon ? ` ${classNames.icon}` : ''}`}>
1169:       <AnimatePresence mode="wait">
1170:         <motion.div
1171:           key={isLoading ? 'spinner' : effectivePhase}
1172:           initial={prefersReducedMotion ? false : { opacity: 0, scale: 0.5 }}
1173:           animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1 }}
1174:           exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.5 }}
1175:           transition={iconTransition}
1176:         >
1177:           {renderIcon()}
1178:         </motion.div>
1179:       </AnimatePresence>
1180:     </div>
1181:   )
1182:   const titleEl = (
1183:     <span className={`${styles.title}${classNames?.title ? ` ${classNames.title}` : ''}`}>{effectiveTitle}</span>
1184:   )
1185: 
1186:   // Capture creation time on mount for the timestamp display
1187:   const createdAtRef = useRef(new Date())
1188:   const timestampStr = useMemo(
1189:     () => createdAtRef.current.toLocaleTimeString(undefined, { hour: 'numeric', minute: '2-digit', second: '2-digit' }),
1190:     [],
1191:   )
1192: 
1193:   const iconAndTitle = (
1194:     <>{iconEl}{titleEl}</>
1195:   )
1196: 
1197:   // Memoize base position style so a new object isn't created every render
1198:   const basePositionStyle = useMemo<React.CSSProperties>(
1199:     () => isCenter ? { margin: '0 auto' } : isRight ? { marginLeft: 'auto', transform: 'scaleX(-1)' } : {},
1200:     [isCenter, isRight],
1201:   )
1202: 
1203:   // Build wrapper style: merge position styles with swipe transform/opacity
1204:   const wrapperStyle = useMemo<React.CSSProperties | undefined>(() => {
1205:     if (swipeTranslate) {
1206:       return {
1207:         ...basePositionStyle,
1208:         transform: (basePositionStyle.transform ? basePositionStyle.transform + ' ' : '') + swipeTranslate,
1209:         opacity: swipeOpacity,
1210:         transition: 'none',
1211:       }
1212:     }
1213:     return Object.keys(basePositionStyle).length > 0 ? basePositionStyle : undefined
1214:   }, [basePositionStyle, swipeTranslate, swipeOpacity])
1215: 
1216:   const contentStyle = useMemo(
1217:     () => isCenter ? { textAlign: 'center' } as const : isRight ? { transform: 'scaleX(-1)', textAlign: 'right' } as const : { textAlign: 'left' } as const,
1218:     [isCenter, isRight],
1219:   )
1220: 
1221:   const handleMouseEnter = useCallback(() => { hoveredRef.current = true; setHovered(true) }, [])
1222:   const handleMouseLeave = useCallback(() => { hoveredRef.current = false; setHovered(false) }, [])
1223: 
1224:   return (
1225:     <div ref={wrapperRef} className={`${styles.wrapper}${classNames?.wrapper ? ` ${classNames.wrapper}` : ''}`} style={wrapperStyle} role={effectivePhase === 'error' || effectivePhase === 'warning' ? 'alert' : 'status'} aria-live={effectivePhase === 'error' || effectivePhase === 'warning' ? 'assertive' : 'polite'} aria-atomic="true" onMouseEnter={handleMouseEnter} onMouseLeave={handleMouseLeave} onTouchStart={handleTouchStart} onTouchMove={handleTouchMove} onTouchEnd={handleTouchEnd} data-center={isCenter || undefined} data-theme={theme}>

1227:       <svg
1228:         className={styles.blobSvg}
1229:         aria-hidden
1230:       >
1231:         <path
1232:           ref={pathRef}
1233:           fill={fillColor}
1234:           stroke={borderColor || 'none'}
1235:           strokeWidth={borderColor ? (borderWidth ?? 1.5) : 0}
1236:         />
1237:       </svg>
1238: 
1239:       {/* Close button — shown on hover when enabled via GooeyToaster closeButton prop */}
1240:       {showCloseButton && effectivePhase !== 'loading' && (

1242:           className={`${styles.closeButton}${(isRight ? closeButtonSetting !== 'top-right' : closeButtonSetting === 'top-right') ? ` ${styles.closeButtonRight}` : ''}`}
1243:           aria-label="Close toast"
1244:           type="button"
1245:           style={{

1272:           {iconAndTitle}

1274:           {!hasDescription && !hasAction && !actionSuccess && showTimestamp && <span className={styles.timestamp}>{timestampStr}</span>}
```

```
154:     const el = document.createElement('div')
155:     el.setAttribute('data-gooey-toast-css', '')
156:     el.style.position = 'absolute'
157:     el.style.width = '0'
158:     el.style.height = '0'
159:     el.style.overflow = 'hidden'
160:     el.style.pointerEvents = 'none'
161:     document.body.appendChild(el)
162: 
163:     const value = getComputedStyle(el).getPropertyValue('--gooey-toast')
164:     document.body.removeChild(el)
165: 
166:     if (!value) {
167:       console.warn(
168:         '[gooey-toast] Styles not found. Make sure to import the CSS:\n\n' +
169:         '  import "goey-toast/styles.css";\n'
170:       )
171:     }
172:   }, [])
173: 
174:   return (
175:     <>
176:       <Toaster
177:         position={position}
178:         duration={duration}
179:         gap={gap}
180:         offset={offset}
181:         theme={theme}
182:         toastOptions={{ unstyled: true, ...toastOptions }}
183:         expand={expand}
184:         closeButton={false}
185:         richColors={richColors}
186:         visibleToasts={99}
187:         dir={dir}
188:       />
189:       <AriaLiveAnnouncer />
190:     </>
191:   )
192: }

(End of file - total 192 lines)
</content>
```

```
1: /* Spinner animation */
2: .gooey-spinnerSpin {

11: /* Center position: center the toast within Sonner's container */
12: [data-sonner-toast][data-x-position="center"] {
13:   left: 0 !important;
14:   right: 0 !important;
15:   margin-left: auto !important;

20: /* Fix mobile centering: override Sonner's mobile offset variables for center positions */

32: /* When Sonner expands the stack (hover), shorten height/transform CSS transitions
```

```
<path>/Users/joe/Dev/github/goey-toast/goey-toast-react/src/components/AriaLiveAnnouncer.tsx</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
```
```
1: import { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from 'react'
2: import { subscribeAnnouncements } from '../context'
3: 
4: /**
5:  * Persistent ARIA live region that announces toast notifications to screen readers.
6:  *
7:  * Two regions are rendered (polite + assertive) so the correct politeness level
8:  * is used per toast type. Both regions are visually hidden but remain in the DOM
9:  * so screen readers can detect content changes reliably.
10:  *
11:  * Messages are cleared after a short delay to avoid stale announcements
12:  * accumulating in the live region.
13:  */
14: export function AriaLiveAnnouncer() {
15:   const [politeMessage, setPoliteMessage] = useState('')
16:   const [assertiveMessage, setAssertiveMessage] = useState('')
17: 
18:   const handleAnnouncement = useCallback(({ message, politeness }: { message: string; politeness: 'polite' | 'assertive' }) => {
19:     if (politeness === 'assertive') {
20:       // Clear first to ensure re-announcement of identical messages
21:       setAssertiveMessage('')
22:       requestAnimationFrame(() => setAssertiveMessage(message))
23:     } else {
24:       setPoliteMessage('')
25:       requestAnimationFrame(() => setPoliteMessage(message))
26:     }
27:   }, [])
28: 
29:   useEffect(() => {
30:     return subscribeAnnouncements(handleAnnouncement)
31:   }, [handleAnnouncement])
32: 
33:   // Clear messages after screen reader has had time to announce them
34:   useEffect(() => {
35:     if (!politeMessage) return
36:     const t = setTimeout(() => setPoliteMessage(''), 7000)
37:     return () => clearTimeout(t)
38:   }, [politeMessage])
39: 
40:   useEffect(() => {
41:     if (!assertiveMessage) return
42:     const t = setTimeout(() => setAssertiveMessage(''), 7000)
43:     return () => clearTimeout(t)
44:   }, [assertiveMessage])
45: 
46:   const visuallyHidden: React.CSSProperties = {
47:     position: 'absolute',
48:     width: '1px',
49:     height: '1px',
50:     padding: 0,
51:     margin: '-1px',
52:     overflow: 'hidden',
53:     clip: 'rect(0, 0, 0, 0)',
54:     whiteSpace: 'nowrap',
55:     border: 0,
56:   }
57: 
58:   return (
59:     <>
60:       <div
61:         role="status"
62:         aria-live="polite"
63:         aria-atomic="true"
64:         style={visuallyHidden}
65:       >
66:         {politeMessage}
67:       </div>
68:       <div
69:         role="alert"
70:         aria-live="assertive"
71:         aria-atomic="true"
72:         style={visuallyHidden}
73:       >
74:         {assertiveMessage}
75:       </div>
76:     </>
77:   )
78: }

(End of file - total 78 lines)
</content>
```

```
1: import { Component, type ReactNode, type ErrorInfo } from 'react'
2: 
3: interface Props {
4:   children: ReactNode
5: }
6: 
7: interface State {
8:   hasError: boolean
9: }
10: 
11: export class ToastErrorBoundary extends Component<Props, State> {
12:   state: State = { hasError: false }
13: 
14:   static getDerivedStateFromError(): State {
15:     return { hasError: true }
16:   }
17: 
18:   componentDidCatch(error: Error, errorInfo: ErrorInfo) {
19:     if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production') {
20:       console.error('[GooeyToast] Rendering error:', error, errorInfo)
21:     }
22:   }
23: 
24:   render() {
25:     if (this.state.hasError) {
26:       return null
27:     }
28:     return this.props.children
29:   }
30: }

```

},\n  \"license\": \"MIT\",\n  \"engines\": {\n    \"node\": \">=18.0.0\"\n  }\n}\n```\n\n### Step 1.2: `goey-toast-vue/tsconfig.json`\n\n```json\n{\n  \"compilerOptions\": {\n    \"target\": \"sourceMap\": true,\n    \"outDir\": \"dist\",\n    \"rootDir\": \"src\",\n    \"lib\": [\"ES2020\", \"DOM\", \"DOM.Iterable\"],\n    \"types\": [\"vitest/globals\"],\n    \"skipLibCheck\": true,\n [\"src/**/*.ts\", \"src/**/*.vue\"],\n  \"exclude\": [\"node_modules\", \"dist\", \"src/__tests__\"]\n}\n```\n\n### Step 1.3: `goey-toast-vue/vite.config.ts`\n\n```typescript\nimport { defineConfig } from 'vite'\nimport vue from '@vitejs/plugin-vue'\nimport dts from 'vite-plugin-dts'\n\nexport default defineConfig({\n  plugins: [vue(), dts({ rollupTypes: true })],\n  build: {\n    lib: {\n
