{
  "content": "import { watch, onUnmounted, ref, readonly, type Ref } from 'vue'\n\nconst DEFAULT_DISPLAY_DURATION = 4000\n\nexport interface UseToastTimerOptions {\n  duration: Ref<number | undefined>\n  expandDelayMs: Ref<number>\n  collapseMs: Ref<number>\n  paused: Ref<boolean>\n  enabled: Ref<boolean>\n  onTimeout: () => void\n}\n\nexport interface UseToastTimerReturn {\n  progressDuration: Readonly<Ref<number>>\n  restart: () => void\n}\n\nexport function useToastTimer(options: UseToastTimerOptions): UseToastTimerReturn {\n  const progressDuration = ref(0)\n  let remaining: number | null = null\n  let timerStart = 0\n  let timer: ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null = null\n\n  function clearTimer() {\n    if (timer !== null) {\n      clearTimeout(timer)\n      timer = null\n    }\n  }\n\n  function startTimer() {\n    clearTimer()\n\n    const displayMs = options.duration.value ?? DEFAULT_DISPLAY_DURATION\n    const fullDelay = displayMs - options.expandDelayMs.value - options.collapseMs.value\n    progressDuration.value = Math.max(fullDelay, 0)\n    if (fullDelay <= 0) return\n\n    if (options.paused.value) return\n\n    const delay = remaining ?? fullDelay\n    timerStart = Date.now()\n\n    timer = setTimeout(() => {\n      if (options.paused.value) {\n        const elapsed = Date.now() - timerStart\n        remaining = Math.max(0, delay - elapsed)\n        return\n      }\n      remaining = null\n      options.onTimeout()\n    }, delay)\n  }\n\n  function pauseTimer() {\n    if (timer === null) return\n    const elapsed = Date.now() - timerStart\n    const delay = remaining ?? progressDuration.value\n    remaining = Math.max(0, delay - elapsed)\n    clearTimer()\n  }\n\n  function resumeTimer() {\n    if (remaining === null || remaining <= 0) return\n    startTimer()\n  }\n\n  function restart() {\n    remaining = null\n    if (options.enabled.value && !options.paused.value) {\n      startTimer()\n    }\n  }\n\n  watch(\n    [options.enabled, options.paused],\n    ([enabled, paused], [prevEnabled, prevPaused]) => {\n      if (!enabled) {\n        clearTimer()\n        return\n      }\n\n      if (enabled && !prevEnabled) {\n        remaining = null\n        startTimer()\n        return\n      }\n\n      if (paused && !prevPaused) {\n        pauseTimer()\n      } else if (!paused && prevPaused) {\n        resumeTimer()\n      }\n    },\n    { immediate: true },\n  )\n\n  onUnmounted(clearTimer)\n\n  return {\n    progressDuration: readonly(progressDuration),\n    restart,\n  }\n}\n",
  "filePath": "/Users/joe/Dev/github/goey-toast/goey-toast-vue/src/composables/useSwipeToDismiss.ts"
}

{
  "content": "import { ref, readonly, type Ref } from 'vue'\nimport { _config } from '../context'\n\nconst SWIPE_THRESHOLD = 100\n\nexport interface UseSwipeToDismissOptions {\n  onDismiss: () => void\n}\n\nexport interface UseSwipeToDismissReturn {\n  offsetX: Readonly<Ref<number>>\n  opacity: Readonly<Ref<number>>\n  swiping: Readonly<Ref<boolean>>\n  onTouchStart: (e: TouchEvent) => void\n  onTouchMove: (e: TouchEvent) => void\n  onTouchEnd: () => void\n}\n\nexport function useSwipeToDismiss(options: UseSwipeToDismissOptions): UseSwipeToDismissReturn {\n  const offsetX = ref(0)\n  const opacity = ref(1)\n  const swiping = ref(false)\n\n  let startPos: { x: number; y: number } | null = null\n  let locked = false\n\n  function onTouchStart(e: TouchEvent) {\n    if (!_config.swipeToDismiss) return\n    const touch = e.touches[0]\n    startPos = { x: touch.clientX, y: touch.clientY }\n    locked = false\n  }\n\n  function onTouchMove(e: TouchEvent) {\n    if (!startPos || !_config.swipeToDismiss) return\n    const touch = e.touches[0]\n    const dx = touch.clientX - startPos.x\n    const dy = touch.clientY - startPos.y\n\n    if (!locked && Math.abs(dy) > Math.abs(dx) && Math.abs(dy) > 10) {\n      startPos = null\n      return\n    }\n\n    if (!locked && Math.abs(dx) > 10) {\n      locked = true\n    }\n\n    if (locked) {\n      swiping.value = true\n      offsetX.value = dx\n      opacity.value = Math.max(0, 1 - Math.abs(dx) / (SWIPE_THRESHOLD * 1.5))\n    }\n  }\n\n  function onTouchEnd() {\n    if (!_config.swipeToDismiss) {\n      startPos = null\n      return\n    }\n    if (locked && Math.abs(offsetX.value) >= SWIPE_THRESHOLD) {\n      options.onDismiss()\n    }\n    startPos = null\n    locked = false\n    swiping.value = false\n    offsetX.value = 0\n    opacity.value = 1\n  }\n\n  return {\n    offsetX: readonly(offsetX),\n    opacity: readonly(opacity),\n    swiping: readonly(swiping),\n    onTouchStart,\n    onTouchMove,\n    onTouchEnd,\n  }\n}\n",

  "newString": "import { ref, readonly, type Ref } from 'vue'\nimport { _config } from '../context'\n\nconst SWIPE_THRESHOLD = 100\n\nexport interface UseSwipeToDismissOptions {\n  onDismiss: () => void\n}\n\nexport interface UseSwipeToDismissReturn {\n  offsetX: Readonly<Ref<number>>\n  opacity: Readonly<Ref<number>>\n  swiping: Readonly<Ref<boolean>>\n  onTouchStart: (e: TouchEvent) => void\n  onTouchMove: (e: TouchEvent) => void\n  onTouchEnd: () => void\n}\n\nexport function useSwipeToDismiss(options: UseSwipeToDismissOptions): UseSwipeToDismissReturn {\n  const offsetX = ref(0)\n  const opacity = ref(1)\n  const swiping = ref(false)\n\n  let startPos: { x: number; y: number } | null = null\n  let locked = false\n\n  function onTouchStart(e: TouchEvent) {\n    if (!_config.swipeToDismiss) return\n    const touch = e.touches[0]\n    startPos = { x: touch.clientX, y: touch.clientY }\n    locked = false\n  }\n\n  function onTouchMove(e: TouchEvent) {\n    if (!startPos || !_config.swipeToDismiss) return\n    const touch = e.touches[0]\n    const dx = touch.clientX - startPos.x\n    const dy = touch.clientY - startPos.y\n\n    if (!locked && Math.abs(dy) > Math.abs(dx) && Math.abs(dy) > 10) {\n      startPos = null\n      return\n    }\n\n    if (!locked && Math.abs(dx) > 10) {\n      locked = true\n    }\n\n    if (locked) {\n      swiping.value = true\n      offsetX.value = dx\n      opacity.value = Math.max(0, 1 - Math.abs(dx) / (SWIPE_THRESHOLD * 1.5))\n    }\n  }\n\n  function onTouchEnd() {\n    if (!_config.swipeToDismiss) {\n      startPos = null\n      return\n    }\n    if (locked && Math.abs(offsetX.value) >= SWIPE_THRESHOLD) {\n      options.onDismiss()\n    }\n    startPos = null\n    locked = false\n    swiping.value = false\n    offsetX.value = 0\n    opacity.value = 1\n  }\n\n  return {\n    offsetX: readonly(offsetX),\n    opacity: readonly(opacity),\n    swiping: readonly(swiping),\n    onTouchStart,\n    onTouchMove,\n    onTouchEnd,\n  }\n}"
}
```

**Output:**
```
Edit applied successfully.
```

## Assistant (Compaction · Claude Opus 4.6 · 69.1s)



## Goal

Port goey-toast-react library to goey-toast-vue (Vue 3) with 100% feature parity, consistent public API, and Vue-idiomatic internal implementation. The project follows an 11-phase implementation plan.

## Instructions

- Read and follow the implementation plan at `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-17-goey-toast-vue.md` — it is the authoritative execution guide with 11 phases
- The design spec at `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-17-goey-toast-vue-design.md` contains all approved architectural decisions
- User chose: Motion (motion.dev) as animation engine, from-scratch toast container (no Sonner), Vue 3 only (>=3.3), 100% feature parity, API aligned with React version, Vue idiomatic rewrite (方案 A)
- About 40% of code can be directly copied (pure functions, CSS, class name maps); 60% needs rewrite
- Key React→Vue mappings: `useState` → `ref()`, `useEffect` → `watch()`, `useCallback` → plain function, `useMemo` → `computed()`, `AnimatePresence` → `<Transition>`, Sonner's `toast.custom()/toast.dismiss()` → reactive `_toasts` array, getter/setter + pub/sub → `reactive()` singleton
- Build system: Vite lib mode + @vitejs/plugin-vue + vite-plugin-dts (not tsup, because SFC needs vue plugin)
- Comment policy: The project has a hook that flags all comments/docstrings. Only necessary comments allowed (mathematical formulas, intentionally empty catch blocks, TypeScript triple-slash directives). Remove all unnecessary comments.

## Discoveries

- React version heavily hacks Sonner (syncSonnerHeights, registerSonnerObserver, MutationObserver tricks) — all eliminated in Vue port since we build our own ToastContainer
- React StrictMode double-mount guards (mountedRef + setTimeout pattern) not needed in Vue
- GooeyToastWrapper and PromiseToastWrapper React components are eliminated — ToastContainer renders directly from reactive toast data
- Motion's `animate()` API is nearly identical to Framer Motion's standalone version, making animation code portable
- The core GooeyToast.tsx is 1350 lines with complex animation state machine: mount → expand delay (330ms) → showBody=true → morphT 0→1 → display timer → pre-dismiss → morphT 1→0 → emit dismiss
- SVG morph path generation (morphPathRaw, morphPathCenterRaw) and spring physics (squishSpring) are pure functions — direct copy with zero changes
- `DEFAULT_EXPANDED_DURATION` constant was removed from gooey-toast.ts because in the Vue architecture, timer defaults are handled by the `useToastTimer` composable rather than at the toast creation level
- The swipe-to-dismiss implementation uses touch events (matching React source) rather than pointer events (which the plan originally suggested)
- Risk areas: (1) Motion animate() spring parameter interpretation parity, (2) ToastContainer stacking is novel code replacing Sonner, (3) GooeyToast.vue is 1350 lines needing section-by-section port

## Accomplished

- ✅ Brainstorming with user — all clarifying questions answered, all design choices confirmed
- ✅ Read ALL React source files in full detail
- ✅ Design spec written and committed: `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-17-goey-toast-vue-design.md` (commit d90afe2)
- ✅ Implementation plan written and committed: `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-17-goey-toast-vue.md` (commit 4788e92)

**Completed (this session):**
- ✅ **Phase 1: Scaffolding** — package.json, tsconfig.json, vite.config.ts, vitest.config.ts, env.d.ts, src/index.ts (placeholder), src/__tests__/setup.ts. `npm install` and `npm run build` verified working.
- ✅ **Phase 2: Pure functions & types** — All 5 files written and typecheck clean:
  - `src/types.ts` — All types ported (ReactNode → VNode | string, Sonner types removed, ToastPosition inline union added)
  - `src/presets.ts` — Direct copy from React
  - `src/morph.ts` — Extracted morph functions from GooeyToast.tsx (morphPathRaw, morphPathCenterRaw, memoizePath, PH constant)
  - `src/spring.ts` — Extracted spring physics (squishSpring, DEFAULT_EXPAND_DUR, DEFAULT_COLLAPSE_DUR, SMOOTH_EASE)
  - `src/components/gooey-styles.ts` — Direct copy of class name map
- ✅ **Phase 3: State management** — Both files written and typecheck clean:
  - `src/context.ts` — Reactive singleton replacing getter/setter/pub-sub pattern (_config reactive, containerHovered ref, _announcement ref, announce function)
  - `src/gooey-toast.ts` — Complete rewrite: reactive _toasts array replaces Sonner, InternalToast interface, queue logic, dismiss logic (by id/filter/all), promise toast handling with .then/.catch mutating reactive data, ARIA announcements, public gooeyToast API
- ✅ **Phase 4: Composables** — All 3 files written:

  - `src/composables/useToastTimer.ts` — Timer with pause/resume/restart, progress duration tracking
  - `src/composables/useSwipeToDismiss.ts` — Touch-based swipe gesture with threshold, opacity feedback

[Project README: /Users/joe/Dev/github/goey-toast/goey-toast-react/README.md]
# gooey-toast

[![gooey-toast](https://goey-toast.vercel.app/og-image.png)](https://goey-toast.vercel.app)

**[Live Demo & Docs](https://goey-toast.vercel.app)**

## Features

- Organic blob morph animation (pill &rarr; blob &rarr; pill)
- Five toast types: default, success, error, warning, info
- Promise toasts with loading &rarr; success/error transitions
- Action buttons with optional success label morph-back
- Description body supporting strings and React components
- Configurable display duration and bounce intensity
- Custom fill color, border color, and border width
- CSS class overrides via `classNames` prop
- 6 positions with automatic horizontal mirroring for right-side positions
- Center positions with symmetric morph animation
- Hover pause: hovering an expanded toast pauses the dismiss timer
- Hover re-expand: hovering a collapsed pill re-expands the toast
- Pre-dismiss collapse animation
- In-place toast updates via `gooeyToast.update()`
- Dismiss by type filter: `gooeyToast.dismiss({ type: 'error' })`
- Dark mode and RTL layout support
- Animation presets: smooth, bouncy, subtle, snappy
- Timestamp display on expanded toasts with optional `showTimestamp` toggle
- Close button with configurable position (`top-left` / `top-right`)
- Countdown progress bar with hover-pause and re-expand
- Keyboard dismiss (Escape) and swipe-to-dismiss on mobile
- Toast queue with configurable overflow strategy
- Dismiss callbacks: `onDismiss` and `onAutoClose`

## Installation

```bash
npm install goey-toast
```

### shadcn/ui

```bash
npx shadcn@latest add https://goey-toast.vercel.app/r/goey-toaster.json
```

This installs a thin wrapper component at `components/ui/goey-toaster.tsx` and auto-installs the `goey-toast` and `framer-motion` packages.

### Peer Dependencies

goey-toast requires the following peer dependencies:

```bash
npm install react react-dom framer-motion
```

| Package        | Version    |
| -------------- | ---------- |
| react          | >= 18.0.0  |
| react-dom      | >= 18.0.0  |
| framer-motion  | >= 10.0.0  |

### CSS Import (Required)

You **must** import the goey-toast stylesheet for the component to render correctly:

```tsx
import 'goey-toast/styles.css'
```

Add this import once in your app's entry point (e.g., `main.tsx` or `App.tsx`). Without it, toasts will appear unstyled.

## Quick Start

```tsx
import { GooeyToaster, gooeyToast } from 'goey-toast'
import 'goey-toast/styles.css'

function App() {
  return (
    <>
      <GooeyToaster position="bottom-right" />
      <button onClick={() => gooeyToast.success('Saved!')}>
        Save
      </button>
    </>
  )
}
```

## API Reference

### `gooeyToast` Methods

```ts
gooeyToast(title, options?)              // default (neutral)
gooeyToast.success(title, options?)      // green
gooeyToast.error(title, options?)        // red
gooeyToast.warning(title, options?)      // yellow
gooeyToast.info(title, options?)         // blue
gooeyToast.promise(promise, data)        // loading -> success/error
gooeyToast.update(id, options)           // update an existing toast in-place
gooeyToast.dismiss(idOrFilter?)          // dismiss one, by type, or all toasts
```

#### `gooeyToast.update(id, options)`

Updates an existing toast in-place without removing and re-creating it.

```tsx
const id = gooeyToast('Uploading...', {
  icon: <SpinnerIcon />,
})

// Later, update the toast
gooeyToast.update(id, {
  title: 'Upload complete',
  type: 'success',
  description: '3 files uploaded.',
  icon: null, // clears the custom icon
})
```

**`GooeyToastUpdateOptions`:**

| Option        | Type              | Description                   |
| ------------- | ----------------- | ----------------------------- |
| `title`       | `string`          | New title text                |
| `description` | `ReactNode`       | New body content              |
| `type`        | `GooeyToastType`   | Change the toast type/color   |
| `action`      | `GooeyToastAction` | New action button             |
| `icon`        | `ReactNode \| null` | Custom icon (pass `null` to clear) |

#### `gooeyToast.dismiss(idOrFilter?)`

Dismiss a single toast by ID, all toasts of a given type, or all toasts at once.

```ts
// Dismiss a specific toast
gooeyToast.dismiss(toastId)

// Dismiss all error toasts
gooeyToast.dismiss({ type: 'error' })

// Dismiss multiple types
gooeyToast.dismiss({ type: ['error', 'warning'] })

// Dismiss all toasts
gooeyToast.dismiss()
```

### `GooeyToastOptions`

Options passed as the second argument to `gooeyToast()` and type-specific methods.

| Option        | Type                 | Description                        |
| ------------- | -------------------- | ---------------------------------- |
| `description` | `ReactNode`          | Body content (string or component) |
| `action`      | `GooeyToastAction`    | Action button configuration        |
| `icon`        | `ReactNode`          | Custom icon override               |
| `duration`    | `number`             | Display duration in ms             |
| `id`          | `string \| number`   | Unique toast identifier            |
| `classNames`  | `GooeyToastClassNames`| CSS class overrides                |
| `fillColor`   | `string`             | Background color of the blob       |
| `borderColor` | `string`             | Border color of the blob           |
| `borderWidth` | `number`             | Border width in px (default 1.5)   |
| `timing`      | `GooeyToastTimings`   | Animation timing overrides         |
| `spring`      | `boolean`            | Enable spring/bounce animations (default `true`) |
| `bounce`      | `number`             | Spring intensity from `0.05` (subtle) to `0.8` (dramatic), default `0.4` |
| `showTimestamp` | `boolean`         | Show/hide timestamp in toast header/body (default `true`) |
| `showProgress`| `boolean`            | Show countdown progress bar                      |
| `onDismiss`   | `(id) => void`       | Called when toast is dismissed (any reason)       |
| `onAutoClose` | `(id) => void`       | Called only on timer-based auto-dismiss           |
| `preset`      | `AnimationPresetName`| Animation preset (`'smooth'`, `'bouncy'`, `'subtle'`, `'snappy'`) |

### `GooeyToastAction`

| Property       | Type       | Required | Description                                  |
| -------------- | ---------- | -------- | -------------------------------------------- |
| `label`        | `string`   | Yes      | Button text                                  |
| `onClick`      | `() => void` | Yes   | Click handler                                |
| `successLabel` | `string`   | No       | Label shown after click (morphs back to pill)|

### `GooeyToastTimings`

Fine-tune animation speeds per toast.

| Property           | Type     | Default | Description                          |
| ------------------ | -------- | ------- | ------------------------------------ |
| `displayDuration`  | `number` | 4000    | Milliseconds toast stays expanded    |

### `GooeyToastClassNames`

Override styles for any part of the toast.

| Key             | Target           |
| --------------- | ---------------- |
| `wrapper`       | Outer container  |
| `content`       | Content area     |
| `header`        | Icon + title row |
| `title`         | Title text       |
| `icon`          | Icon wrapper     |
| `description`   | Body text        |
| `actionWrapper` | Button container |
| `actionButton`  | Action button    |

### `GooeyToasterProps`

Props for the `<GooeyToaster />` component.

| Prop         | Type                                  | Default          | Description                                   |
| ------------ | ------------------------------------- | ---------------- | --------------------------------------------- |
| `position`   | `'top-left' \| 'top-center' \| 'top-right' \| 'bottom-left' \| 'bottom-center' \| 'bottom-right'` | `'bottom-right'` | Toast position |
| `duration`   | `number`                              | --               | Default display duration in ms                |
| `gap`        | `number`                              | `14`             | Gap between stacked toasts (px)               |
| `offset`     | `number \| string`                    | `'24px'`         | Distance from screen edge                     |
| `theme`      | `'light' \| 'dark'`                   | `'light'`        | Color theme                                   |
| `toastOptions` | `Partial<ExternalToast>`            | --               | Default options passed to Sonner              |
| `spring`     | `boolean`                             | `true`           | Enable spring/bounce animations globally      |
| `bounce`     | `number`                              | `0.4`            | Spring intensity: `0.05` (subtle) to `0.8` (dramatic) |
| `preset`     | `AnimationPresetName`                 | --               | Animation preset for all toasts               |
| `closeOnEscape` | `boolean`                          | `true`           | Dismiss most recent toast on Escape key       |
| `closeButton`  | `boolean \| 'top-left' \| 'top-right'` | `false`       | Show close button on hover                    |
| `showProgress` | `boolean`                           | `false`          | Show countdown progress bar on all toasts     |
| `maxQueue`   | `number`                              | `Infinity`       | Maximum queued toasts                         |
| `queueOverflow` | `'drop-oldest' \| 'drop-newest'`   | `'drop-oldest'`  | Queue overflow strategy                       |
| `dir`        | `'ltr' \| 'rtl'`                     | `'ltr'`          | Layout direction                              |
| `swipeToDismiss` | `boolean`                         | `true`           | Enable swipe-to-dismiss on mobile             |

### `GooeyPromiseData<T>`

Configuration for `gooeyToast.promise()`.

| Property      | Type                                          | Required | Description                                    |
| ------------- | --------------------------------------------- | -------- | ---------------------------------------------- |
| `loading`     | `string`                                      | Yes      | Title shown during loading                     |
| `success`     | `string \| ((data: T) => string)`             | Yes      | Title on success (static or derived from result)|
| `error`       | `string \| ((error: unknown) => string)`      | Yes      | Title on error (static or derived from error)  |
| `description` | `object`                                      | No       | Per-phase descriptions (see below)             |
| `action`      | `object`                                      | No       | Per-phase action buttons (see below)           |
| `classNames`  | `GooeyToastClassNames`                         | No       | CSS class overrides                            |
| `fillColor`   | `string`                                      | No       | Background color of the blob                   |
| `borderColor` | `string`                                      | No       | Border color of the blob                       |
| `borderWidth` | `number`                                      | No       | Border width in px                             |
| `timing`      | `GooeyToastTimings`                            | No       | Animation timing overrides                     |
| `spring`      | `boolean`                                     | No       | Enable spring/bounce animations (default `true`) |
| `bounce`      | `number`                                      | No       | Spring intensity: `0.05` (subtle) to `0.8` (dramatic), default `0.4` |
| `onDismiss`   | `(id: string \| number) => void`              | No       | Called when toast is dismissed (any reason)       |
| `onAutoClose` | `(id: string \| number) => void`              | No       | Called only on timer-based auto-dismiss           |

**`description` sub-fields:**

| Key       | Type                                             |
| --------- | ------------------------------------------------ |
| `loading` | `ReactNode`                                      |
| `success` | `ReactNode \| ((data: T) => ReactNode)`          |
| `error`   | `ReactNode \| ((error: unknown) => ReactNode)`   |

**`action` sub-fields:**

| Key       | Type              |
| --------- | ----------------- |
| `success` | `GooeyToastAction` |
| `error`   | `GooeyToastAction` |

## Usage Examples

### Description

```tsx
gooeyToast.error('Payment failed', {
  description: 'Your card was declined. Please try again.',
})
```

### Custom React Component as Description

```tsx
gooeyToast.success('Deployment complete', {
  description: (
    <div style={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: 10 }}>
      <div>
        <span>Environment:</span> <strong>Production</strong>
      </div>
      <div>
        <span>Branch:</span> <strong>main @ 3f8a2c1</strong>
      </div>
    </div>
  ),
})
```

### Action Button with Success Label

```tsx
gooeyToast.info('Share link ready', {
  description: 'Your link has been generated.',
  action: {
    label: 'Copy to Clipboard',
    onClick: () => navigator.clipboard.writeText(url),
    successLabel: 'Copied!',
  },
})
```

### Promise Toast

```tsx
gooeyToast.promise(saveData(), {
  loading: 'Saving...',
  success: 'Changes saved',
  error: 'Something went wrong',
  description: {
    success: 'All changes have been synced.',
    error: 'Please try again later.',
  },
  action: {
    error: {
      label: 'Retry',
      onClick: () => retry(),
    },
  },
})
```

### Custom Styling

```tsx
gooeyToast.success('Styled!', {
  fillColor: '#1a1a2e',
  borderColor: '#333',
  borderWidth: 2,
  classNames: {
    wrapper: 'my-wrapper',
    title: 'my-title',
    description: 'my-desc',
    actionButton: 'my-btn',
  },
})
```

### Display Duration

```tsx
gooeyToast.success('Saved', {
  description: 'Your changes have been synced.',
  timing: { displayDuration: 5000 },
})
```

### Disabling Spring Animations

Disable bounce/spring animations for a cleaner, more subtle look:

```tsx
// Per-toast: disable spring for this toast only
gooeyToast.success('Saved', {
  description: 'Your changes have been synced.',
  spring: false,
})

// Globally: disable spring for all toasts
<GooeyToaster spring={false} />
```

When `spring` is `false`, all spring-based animations (landing squish, blob squish, morph transitions, pill resize, header squish) use smooth ease-in-out curves instead. Error shake animations still work regardless of this setting.

### Bounce Intensity

Control how dramatic the spring effect feels with a single `bounce` value:

```tsx
// Subtle, barely-there spring
gooeyToast.success('Saved', { bounce: 0.1 })

// Default feel
gooeyToast.success('Saved', { bounce: 0.4 })

// Jelly mode
gooeyToast.success('Saved', { bounce: 0.8 })

// Set globally via GooeyToaster
<GooeyToaster bounce={0.6} />
```

The `bounce` value (0.05 to 0.8) controls spring stiffness, damping, and squish magnitude together so you get a consistent feel from one number.

### Dark Mode

```tsx
<GooeyToaster theme="dark" />
```

### RTL Support

```tsx
<GooeyToaster dir="rtl" />
```

### Animation Presets

Four built-in presets: `smooth`, `bouncy`, `subtle`, `snappy`. Apply per-toast or globally:

```tsx
gooeyToast.success('Saved', { preset: 'bouncy' })

// Or globally
<GooeyToaster preset="smooth" />
```

### Progress Bar

Show a countdown progress bar on toasts:

```tsx
gooeyToast.success('Saved', { showProgress: true })

// Or enable globally
<GooeyToaster showProgress />
```

### Keyboard Shortcuts

Press **Escape** to dismiss the most recent toast. Enabled by default; disable with `closeOnEscape={false}`.

### Swipe to Dismiss

On mobile, swipe toasts to dismiss them. Enabled by default; disable with `swipeToDismiss={false}`.

### Close Button

Show a close button on hover. Position it `top-left` (default) or `top-right`:

```tsx
<GooeyToaster closeButton />
<GooeyToaster closeButton="top-left" />
<GooeyToaster closeButton="top-right" />
```

The close button inherits the toast's border and fill color styling. Hidden during the loading phase of promise toasts.

### Hiding Timestamps

Hide the timestamp from toasts:

```tsx
gooeyToast.success('Saved', { showTimestamp: false })
```

## Exports

```ts
// Components
export { GooeyToaster } from 'goey-toast'

// Toast function
export { gooeyToast } from 'goey-toast'

// Animation presets
export { animationPresets } from 'goey-toast'

// Types
export type {
  GooeyToastOptions,
  GooeyPromiseData,
  GooeyToasterProps,
  GooeyToastAction,
  GooeyToastClassNames,
  GooeyToastTimings,
  GooeyToastUpdateOptions,
  DismissFilter,
  AnimationPreset,
  AnimationPresetName,
} from 'goey-toast'
```

## Browser Support

goey-toast works in all modern browsers that support:

- CSS Modules
- SVG path animations
- ResizeObserver
- `framer-motion` (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge)

## See Also

- **[gooey-search-tabs](https://github.com/anl331/gooey-search-tabs)** — A morphing search bar with animated tab navigation for React. [Live Demo](https://gooey-search-tabs.vercel.app)

## License

[MIT](./LICENSE)

<path>/Users/joe/Dev/github/goey-toast/goey-toast-react/src/components/AriaLiveAnnouncer.tsx</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: import { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from 'react'
2: import { subscribeAnnouncements } from '../context'
3: 
4: /**
5:  * Persistent ARIA live region that announces toast notifications to screen readers.
6:  *
7:  * Two regions are rendered (polite + assertive) so the correct politeness level
8:  * is used per toast type. Both regions are visually hidden but remain in the DOM
9:  * so screen readers can detect content changes reliably.
10:  *
11:  * Messages are cleared after a short delay to avoid stale announcements
12:  * accumulating in the live region.
13:  */
14: export function AriaLiveAnnouncer() {
15:   const [politeMessage, setPoliteMessage] = useState('')
16:   const [assertiveMessage, setAssertiveMessage] = useState('')
17: 
18:   const handleAnnouncement = useCallback(({ message, politeness }: { message: string; politeness: 'polite' | 'assertive' }) => {
19:     if (politeness === 'assertive') {
20:       // Clear first to ensure re-announcement of identical messages
21:       setAssertiveMessage('')
22:       requestAnimationFrame(() => setAssertiveMessage(message))
23:     } else {
24:       setPoliteMessage('')
25:       requestAnimationFrame(() => setPoliteMessage(message))
26:     }
27:   }, [])
28: 
29:   useEffect(() => {
30:     return subscribeAnnouncements(handleAnnouncement)
31:   }, [handleAnnouncement])
32: 
33:   // Clear messages after screen reader has had time to announce them
34:   useEffect(() => {
35:     if (!politeMessage) return
36:     const t = setTimeout(() => setPoliteMessage(''), 7000)
37:     return () => clearTimeout(t)
38:   }, [politeMessage])
39: 
40:   useEffect(() => {
41:     if (!assertiveMessage) return
42:     const t = setTimeout(() => setAssertiveMessage(''), 7000)
43:     return () => clearTimeout(t)
44:   }, [assertiveMessage])
45: 
46:   const visuallyHidden: React.CSSProperties = {
47:     position: 'absolute',
48:     width: '1px',
49:     height: '1px',
50:     padding: 0,
51:     margin: '-1px',
52:     overflow: 'hidden',
53:     clip: 'rect(0, 0, 0, 0)',
54:     whiteSpace: 'nowrap',
55:     border: 0,
56:   }
57: 
58:   return (
59:     <>
60:       <div
61:         role="status"
62:         aria-live="polite"
63:         aria-atomic="true"
64:         style={visuallyHidden}
65:       >
66:         {politeMessage}
67:       </div>
68:       <div
69:         role="alert"
70:         aria-live="assertive"
71:         aria-atomic="true"
72:         style={visuallyHidden}
73:       >
74:         {assertiveMessage}
75:       </div>
76:     </>
77:   )
78: }

(End of file - total 78 lines)
</content>
```

3: interface Props {

11: export class ToastErrorBoundary extends Component<Props, State> {

14:   static getDerivedStateFromError(): State {

1: # goey-toast-vue Implementation Plan

6: ## Execution Order & Dependencies

8: ```
9: Phase 1  Scaffolding (package.json, configs)

18: Phase 3  State management (Vue reactive, no components)

22: Phase 4  Composables

27: Phase 5  Simple components

31:   │
32: Phase 6  ToastContainer.vue (replaces Sonner)

42: Phase 11 Build & verify

203: ---
204: 
205: ## Phase 2: Pure Functions & Types
206: 
207: **Goal**: Port all framework-agnostic code. These files have zero Vue/React imports.
208: 
209: ### Step 2.1: `src/types.ts`
210: 
211: Copy from React `types.ts`. Changes:
212: - Remove `import type { ReactNode } from 'react'`
213: - Remove `import type { ExternalToast, ToasterProps } from 'sonner'`
214: - Replace all `ReactNode` with `VNode | string` (import from `vue`)
215: - Replace `ToasterProps['position']` with inline union type `'top-left' | 'top-center' | 'top-right' | 'bottom-left' | 'bottom-center' | 'bottom-right'`
216: - Remove `GooeyToasterProps.toastOptions` (Sonner-specific `Partial<ExternalToast>`)
217: - Remove `GooeyToasterProps.richColors` (Sonner-specific)
218: - Remove `GooeyToasterProps.expand` (Sonner-specific — our ToastContainer handles this)
219: - Keep `GooeyToasterProps.visibleToasts` (we implement this ourselves)
220: 
221: Full type list to port:
222: - `GooeyToastType` — identical
223: - `GooeyToastTimings` — identical
224: - `GooeyToastClassNames` — identical
225: - `GooeyToastAction` — identical
226: - `GooeyToastData` — `ReactNode` → `VNode | string`
227: - `GooeyToastOptions` — `ReactNode` → `VNode | string`
228: - `GooeyPromiseData<T>` — `ReactNode` → `VNode | string`
229: - `GooeyToastPhase` — identical
230: - `GooeyToastUpdateOptions` — `ReactNode` → `VNode | string`
231: - `DismissFilter` — identical
232: - `GooeyToasterProps` — remove Sonner fields, inline position type
233: - `ToastPosition` — new exported type alias for the 6-position union
234: 
235: ### Step 2.2: `src/presets.ts`
236: 
237: **Direct copy** from React `presets.ts`. Zero changes needed.
238: 
239: ```typescript
240: export interface AnimationPreset {
241:   bounce: number
242:   spring: boolean
243: }
244: 
245: export const animationPresets = {
246:   smooth: { bounce: 0.1, spring: true },
247:   bouncy: { bounce: 0.6, spring: true },
248:   subtle: { bounce: 0.05, spring: true },
249:   snappy: { bounce: 0.4, spring: true },
250: } as const satisfies Record<string, AnimationPreset>
251: 
252: export type AnimationPresetName = keyof typeof animationPresets
253: ```
254: 
255: ### Step 2.3: `src/morph.ts`
256: 
257: Extract from React `GooeyToast.tsx` lines 221-360. Three exports:
258: - `memoizePath(fn)` — generic last-result cache
259: - `morphPath` — memoized `morphPathRaw`
260: - `morphPathCenter` — memoized `morphPathCenterRaw`
261: - `PH` constant (= 34)
262: 
263: Also export the raw functions for testing:
264: - `morphPathRaw(pw, bw, th, t)`
265: - `morphPathCenterRaw(pw, bw, th, t)`
266: 
267: **Zero changes** to the math. Direct copy.
268: 
269: ### Step 2.4: `src/spring.ts`
270: 
271: Extract from React `GooeyToast.tsx` lines 77-86. Exports:
272: - `squishSpring(durationSec, defaultDur, bounce?)` — returns `{ type: 'spring', stiffness, damping, mass }`
273: - `DEFAULT_EXPAND_DUR` (= 0.6)
274: - `DEFAULT_COLLAPSE_DUR` (= 0.9)
275: - `SMOOTH_EASE` (= [0.4, 0, 0.2, 1])
276: 
277: **Zero changes**. Direct copy.
278: 
279: ### Step 2.5: `src/components/gooey-styles.ts`
280: 
281: **Direct copy** from React `gooey-styles.ts`. Zero changes.
282: 
283: **Verification**: `npm run typecheck` passes for Phase 2 files.
284: 
285: ---
286: 
287: ## Phase 3: State Management
288: 
289: **Goal**: Replace React's module-level variables + pub/sub with Vue reactive primitives.
290: 
291: ### Step 3.1: `src/context.ts`
292: 
293: Replace the React version's getter/setter + pub/sub pattern with `reactive`/`ref`:
294: 
295: ```typescript
296: import { reactive, ref } from 'vue'
297: import type { ToastPosition } from './types'
298: 
299: // Global config — reactive singleton
300: export const _config = reactive({
301:   position: 'bottom-right' as ToastPosition,
302:   dir: 'ltr' as 'ltr' | 'rtl',
303:   spring: true,
304:   bounce: undefined as number | undefined,
305:   theme: 'light' as 'light' | 'dark',
306:   visibleToasts: 3,
307:   swipeToDismiss: true,
308:   closeOnEscape: true,
309:   maxQueue: Infinity,
310:   queueOverflow: 'drop-oldest' as 'drop-oldest' | 'drop-newest',
311:   showProgress: false,
312:   closeButton: false as boolean | 'top-left' | 'top-right',
313: })
314: 
315: // Container hover state — watched by GooeyToast instances
316: export const containerHovered = ref(false)
317: 
318: // ARIA announcements — watched by AriaLiveAnnouncer
319: export type AriaLivePoliteness = 'polite' | 'assertive'
320: export interface Announcement {
321:   message: string
322:   politeness: AriaLivePoliteness
323: }
324: export const _announcement = ref<Announcement | null>(null)
325: 
326: export function announce(message: string, politeness: AriaLivePoliteness = 'polite') {
327:   // Set to null first to trigger watchers even for identical messages
328:   _announcement.value = null
329:   // nextTick or queueMicrotask to ensure the null is observed before the new value
330:   queueMicrotask(() => {
331:     _announcement.value = { message, politeness }
332:   })
333: }
334: ```
335: 
336: Key difference from React version:
337: - No getter/setter functions needed — direct property access on `_config`
338: - No `subscribeContainerHovered()` — components `watch(containerHovered, ...)`
339: - No `subscribeAnnouncements()` — AriaLiveAnnouncer `watch(_announcement, ...)`
340: - `announce()` uses null→value pattern to re-trigger watchers for duplicate messages
341: 
342: ### Step 3.2: `src/gooey-toast.ts`
343: 
344: The most complex state file. Port from React `gooey-toast.tsx` (502 lines).
345: 
346: Key architectural changes:
347: 1. **No Sonner dependency** — `toast.custom()` / `toast.dismiss()` replaced by reactive array
348: 2. **No React components** — `GooeyToastWrapper` / `PromiseToastWrapper` are not needed; ToastContainer renders directly from the reactive toast list
349: 3. **Toast lifecycle managed by reactive data**, not Sonner unmount
350: 
351: Data structures:
352: 
353: ```typescript
354: import { ref, type Ref } from 'vue'
355: 
356: export interface InternalToast {
357:   id: string | number
358:   title: string
359:   type: GooeyToastType
360:   phase: GooeyToastPhase
361:   description?: VNode | string
362:   action?: GooeyToastAction
363:   icon?: VNode | string
364:   duration?: number
365:   classNames?: GooeyToastClassNames
366:   fillColor?: string
367:   borderColor?: string
368:   borderWidth?: number
369:   timing?: GooeyToastTimings
370:   preset?: AnimationPresetName
371:   spring?: boolean
372:   bounce?: number
373:   showProgress?: boolean
374:   showTimestamp?: boolean
375:   // Promise-specific
376:   _promise?: Promise<unknown>
377:   _promiseData?: GooeyPromiseData<unknown>
378:   // Callbacks
379:   _onDismiss?: (id: string | number) => void
380:   _onAutoClose?: (id: string | number) => void
381: }
382: 
383: // Active toasts visible on screen
384: export const _toasts: Ref<InternalToast[]> = ref([])
385: 
386: // Queue for overflow
387: const _queue: Array<{ id: string | number; type: GooeyToastType; toast: InternalToast }> = []
388: 
389: // Track manual vs auto dismiss
390: const _autoCloseFlags = new Set<string | number>()
391: const _manualDismissFlags = new Set<string | number>()
392: ```
393: 
394: Functions to port (with changes noted):
395: 
396: - `createGooeyToast(title, type, options)` — Instead of `toast.custom()`, push to `_toasts.value`. Queue logic same as React.
397: - `dismissGooeyToast(idOrFilter?)` — Instead of `toast.dismiss()`, splice from `_toasts.value`. Type-filter and dismiss-all logic same as React.
398: - `updateGooeyToast(id, options)` — Find toast in `_toasts.value` by id, mutate fields directly (Vue reactivity picks up changes). No listener registry needed.
399: - `_processQueue()` — Same logic, but `create` callback pushes to `_toasts.value`.

(Showing lines 200-399 of 1081. Use offset=400 to continue.)
</content>
```

433: ---
434: 
435: ## Phase 4: Composables
436: 
437: ### Step 4.1: `src/composables/usePrefersReducedMotion.ts`
438: 
439: Port from React `usePrefersReducedMotion.ts`:
440: 
441: ```typescript
442: import { ref, onMounted, onUnmounted, readonly, type DeepReadonly, type Ref } from 'vue'
443: 
444: const QUERY = '(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)'
445: 
446: export function usePrefersReducedMotion(): Readonly<Ref<boolean>> {
447:   const prefersReducedMotion = ref(
448:     typeof window !== 'undefined' && typeof window.matchMedia === 'function'
449:       ? window.matchMedia(QUERY).matches
450:       : false
451:   )
452: 
453:   let mql: MediaQueryList | null = null
454:   const handler = (e: MediaQueryListEvent) => {
455:     prefersReducedMotion.value = e.matches
456:   }
457: 
458:   onMounted(() => {
459:     if (typeof window === 'undefined' || typeof window.matchMedia !== 'function') return
460:     mql = window.matchMedia(QUERY)
461:     mql.addEventListener('change', handler)
462:   })
463: 
464:   onUnmounted(() => {
465:     mql?.removeEventListener('change', handler)
466:   })
467: 
468:   return readonly(prefersReducedMotion)
469: }
470: ```
471: 
472: ### Step 4.2: `src/composables/useToastTimer.ts`
473: 
474: New composable — extracts the pre-dismiss timer logic from React `GooeyToast.tsx` lines 818-862.
475: 
476: ```typescript
477: interface UseToastTimerOptions {
478:   duration: number           // total display duration ms
479:   expandDelayMs: number      // morph expand delay ms
480:   collapseMs: number         // morph collapse duration ms
481:   paused: Ref<boolean>       // containerHovered || toastHovered
482:   enabled: Ref<boolean>      // showBody && !actionSuccess && !dismissing
483:   onTimeout: () => void      // triggers pre-dismiss collapse
484: }
485: 
486: interface UseToastTimerReturn {
487:   progressDuration: Readonly<Ref<number>>  // for CSS progress bar
488:   restart: () => void                       // reset timer on re-expand
489: }
490: ```
491: 
492: Internal state:
493: - `remainingRef` — tracks remaining ms when paused
494: - `timerStartRef` — timestamp when current timer started
495: - Uses `watch()` on `paused` and `enabled` to start/pause/resume
496:

498: 
499: Extract swipe logic from React `GooeyToast.tsx` lines 1100-1154.

524: ## Phase 5: Simple Components
525: 
526: ### Step 5.1: Icons (`src/icons/`)
527: 
528: 6 Vue SFC files + `index.ts`. Each icon is a thin wrapper around the same SVG from React.
529: 
530: Example — `SuccessIcon.vue`:
531: ```vue
532: <script setup lang="ts">
533: withDefaults(defineProps<{ size?: number; class?: string }>(), { size: 20 })
534: </script>
535: 
536: <template>
537:   <svg
538:     xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
539:     :width="size"
540:     :height="size"
541:     viewBox="0 0 24 24"
542:     fill="none"
543:     stroke="currentColor"
544:     stroke-width="2"
545:     stroke-linecap="round"
546:     stroke-linejoin="round"
547:     :class="$props.class"
548:   >
549:     <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" />
550:     <path d="M9 12l2 2 4-4" />
551:   </svg>
552: </template>
553: ```
554: 
555: Files to create:
556: - `DefaultIcon.vue` — copy SVG paths from React `DefaultIcon.tsx`
557: - `SuccessIcon.vue` — as above
558: - `ErrorIcon.vue` — copy SVG paths from React `ErrorIcon.tsx`
559: - `WarningIcon.vue` — copy SVG paths from React `WarningIcon.tsx`
560: - `InfoIcon.vue` — copy SVG paths from React `InfoIcon.tsx`
561: - `SpinnerIcon.vue` — copy SVG paths from React `SpinnerIcon.tsx`
562: - `index.ts` — re-export all icons
563: 
564: ### Step 5.2: `src/components/AriaLiveAnnouncer.vue`
565: 
566: Port from React `AriaLiveAnnouncer.tsx`. Uses `watch()` on `_announcement` from context.
567: 
568: ```vue
569: <script setup lang="ts">
570: import { ref, watch, nextTick } from 'vue'
571: import { _announcement, type Announcement } from '../context'
572: 
573: const politeMessage = ref('')
574: const assertiveMessage = ref('')
575: 
576: watch(_announcement, (ann: Announcement | null) => {
577:   if (!ann) return
578:   if (ann.politeness === 'assertive') {
579:     assertiveMessage.value = ''
580:     nextTick(() => { assertiveMessage.value = ann.message })
581:   } else {
582:     politeMessage.value = ''
583:     nextTick(() => { politeMessage.value = ann.message })
584:   }
585: })
586: 
587: // Clear after 7 seconds
588: watch(politeMessage, (msg) => {
589:   if (!msg) return
590:   const t = setTimeout(() => { politeMessage.value = '' }, 7000)
591:   // Cleanup not needed for setTimeout in watch — component unmount handles it
592: })
593: watch(assertiveMessage, (msg) => {
594:   if (!msg) return
595:   const t = setTimeout(() => { assertiveMessage.value = '' }, 7000)
596: })
597: </script>
598: 
599: <template>
600:   <div role="status" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"
601:     :style="{ position: 'absolute', width: '1px', height: '1px', padding: 0, margin: '-1px', overflow: 'hidden', clip: 'rect(0,0,0,0)', whiteSpace: 'nowrap', border: 0 }">
602:     {{ politeMessage }}
603:   </div>
604:   <div role="alert" aria-live="assertive" aria-atomic="true"
605:     :style="{ position: 'absolute', width: '1px', height: '1px', padding: 0, margin: '-1px', overflow: 'hidden', clip: 'rect(0,0,0,0)', whiteSpace: 'nowrap', border: 0 }">
606:     {{ assertiveMessage }}
607:   </div>
608: </template>
609: ```
610: 
611: ### Step 5.3: `src/components/ToastErrorBoundary.vue`
612: 
613: Port from React `ToastErrorBoundary.tsx`. Uses `onErrorCaptured()`.
614: 
615: ```vue
616: <script setup lang="ts">
617: import { ref, onErrorCaptured } from 'vue'
618: 
619: const hasError = ref(false)
620: 
621: onErrorCaptured((err) => {
622:   hasError.value = true
623:   if (import.meta.env.DEV) {
624:     console.error('[GooeyToast] Rendering error:', err)
625:   }
626:   return false // prevent propagation
627: })
628: </script>
629: 
630: <template>
631:   <slot v-if="!hasError" />
632: </template>
633: ```
634: 
635: Note: React version renders `null` on error; Vue version renders nothing (empty template).
636: 
637: **Verification**: Component mount tests in Phase 10.
638: 
639: ---
640: 
641: ## Phase 6: ToastContainer.vue
642: 
643: **Goal**: New component that replaces Sonner's `<Toaster>`. Manages toast positioning, stacking, hover expansion.
644: 
645: ### Key responsibilities:
646: 1. `<Teleport to="body">` — render fixed-position `<ol>` outside component tree
647: 2. Render `<li v-for="toast in _toasts">` wrapping `<ToastErrorBoundary><GooeyToast /></ToastErrorBoundary>`
648: 3. Compute stacking offsets: each toast's `translateY` = sum of heights of all newer toasts + gaps

(Showing lines 499-648 of 1081. Use offset=649 to continue.)
</content>
```

  "filePath": "/Users/joe/Dev/github/goey-toast/goey-toast-vue/src/components/AriaLiveAnnouncer.vue",
  "content": "<script setup lang=\"ts\">\nimport { ref, watch, nextTick } from 'vue'\nimport { _announcement, type Announcement } from '../context'\n\nconst politeMessage = ref('')\nconst assertiveMessage = ref('')\n\nwatch(_announcement, (ann: Announcement | null) => {\n  if (!ann) return\n  if (ann.politeness === 'assertive') {\n    assertiveMessage.value = ''\n    nextTick(() => { assertiveMessage.value = ann.message })\n  } else {\n    politeMessage.value = ''\n    nextTick(() => { politeMessage.value = ann.message })\n  }\n})\n\nwatch(politeMessage, (msg, _old, onCleanup) => {\n  if (!msg) return\n  const t = setTimeout(() => { politeMessage.value = '' }, 7000)\n  onCleanup(() => clearTimeout(t))\n})\n\nwatch(assertiveMessage, (msg, _old, onCleanup) => {\n  if (!msg) return\n  const t = setTimeout(() => { assertiveMessage.value = '' }, 7000)\n  onCleanup(() => clearTimeout(t))\n})\n\nconst visuallyHidden = {\n  position: 'absolute',\n  width: '1px',\n  height: '1px',\n  padding: '0',\n  margin: '-1px',\n  overflow: 'hidden',\n  clip: 'rect(0, 0, 0, 0)',\n  whiteSpace: 'nowrap',\n  border: '0',\n} as const\n</script>\n\n<template>\n  <div role=\"status\" aria-live=\"polite\" aria-atomic=\"true\" :style=\"visuallyHidden\">\n    {{ politeMessage }}\n  </div>\n  <div role=\"alert\" aria-live=\"assertive\" aria-atomic=\"true\" :style=\"visuallyHidden\">\n    {{ assertiveMessage }}\n  </div>\n</template>\n"
}

<path>/Users/joe/Dev/github/goey-toast/docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-17-goey-toast-vue.md</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
639: ---
640: 
641: ## Phase 6: ToastContainer.vue
642: 
643: **Goal**: New component that replaces Sonner's `<Toaster>`. Manages toast positioning, stacking, hover expansion.
644: 
645: ### Key responsibilities:
646: 1. `<Teleport to="body">` — render fixed-position `<ol>` outside component tree
647: 2. Render `<li v-for="toast in _toasts">` wrapping `<ToastErrorBoundary><GooeyToast /></ToastErrorBoundary>`
648: 3. Compute stacking offsets: each toast's `translateY` = sum of heights of all newer toasts + gaps
649: 4. Handle hover expand/collapse: `@mouseenter`/`@mouseleave` on `<ol>` sets `containerHovered`
650: 5. Stack scale effect: non-hovered toasts behind front get `scale(1 - i * 0.05)`
651: 
652: ### Props:
653: ```typescript
654: interface ToastContainerProps {
655:   position: ToastPosition
656:   gap: number
657:   offset: number | string
658:   theme: 'light' | 'dark'
659:   dir: 'ltr' | 'rtl'
660: }
661: ```
662: 
663: ### Implementation details:
664: 
665: **Positioning**: CSS `position: fixed`. Position prop maps to CSS:
666: - `bottom-right` → `bottom: {offset}; right: {offset}`
667: - `top-center` → `top: {offset}; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%)`
668: - etc.
669: 
670: **Height tracking**: Each `<GooeyToast>` emits `heightChange(id, height)`. ToastContainer maintains a `Map<id, number>` of current heights. On change, recompute offsets for all toasts.
671: 
672: **Stacking offsets**: `<li>` gets `style.transform = translate3d(0, ${offset}px, 0)`. For bottom positions, offset is negative (toasts stack upward). For top positions, offset is positive.
673: 
674: **Hover behavior**:
675: - `@mouseenter` on `<ol>`: set `containerHovered.value = true`, remove scale/translate compression
676: - `@mouseleave` on `<ol>`: set `containerHovered.value = false`, apply scale/translate compression
677: 
678: **Scale effect** (non-hovered):
679: ```
680: toast[0] (front/newest): scale(1), offset 0
681: toast[1]: scale(0.95), offset = height[0] + gap (compressed)
682: toast[2]: scale(0.90), offset = height[0] + height[1] + 2*gap (compressed)
683: ```
684: When hovered: all toasts scale(1), offset = actual cumulative heights + gaps.
685: 
686: **Transition**: `<li>` gets CSS `transition: transform 0.3s ease, opacity 0.3s ease`.
687: 
688: **Toast removal**: When a toast is dismissed, it's removed from `_toasts` reactively. Vue's `<TransitionGroup>` or manual animation handles the exit.
689: 
690: **Verification**: Stacking offset calculation tests + visual demo.
691: 
692: ---
693: 
694: ## Phase 7: GooeyToast.vue (Core Component)
695: 
696: **Goal**: Port the 1350-line React `GooeyToast.tsx` to a Vue SFC.
697: 
698: This is the most complex step. The component manages:
699: - SVG morph animation (pill → blob → pill)
700: - Spring physics squish effects
701: - State machine (mount → expand → display → pre-dismiss → collapse)
702: - Error shake animation
703: - Hover re-expand
704: - Close button
705: - Progress bar
706: - Swipe-to-dismiss
707: - Action button with success morph-back
708: 
709: ### Architecture decisions:
710: 
711: 1. **Animation controllers** stored as plain variables (not refs) — same as React's `useRef` pattern. Avoids triggering reactivity on animation internals.
712: 
713: 2. **`flush()` function** — direct DOM manipulation for SVG path and content constraints. Same approach as React — avoids reactive overhead on 60fps updates.
714: 
715: 3. **`measure()` function** — reads DOM dimensions. Called via `onMounted`, `ResizeObserver`, and `watch` on props that affect layout.
716: 
717: 4. **State machine** implemented via `watch()` on computed `isExpanded`:
718:    - `isExpanded` true → delay → `showBody = true` → morph 0→1
719:    - `isExpanded` false → morph 1→0 → `showBody = false`
720: 
721: 5. **Timer logic** → `useToastTimer` composable
722: 
723: 6. **Swipe logic** → `useSwipeToDismiss` composable
724: 
725: ### Props (mirrors React `GooeyToastProps`):
726: 
727: ```typescript
728: interface GooeyToastProps {
729:   toast: InternalToast    // full toast data from gooey-toast.ts
730:   toastId: string | number
731: }
732: ```
733: 
734: ### Emits:
735: 
736: ```typescript
737: defineEmits<{
738:   dismiss: [id: string | number]
739:   heightChange: [id: string | number, height: number]
740: }>()
741: ```
742: 
743: ### Key implementation mapping (React → Vue):
744: 
745: | React | Vue |
746: |---|---|
747: | `useState(x)` | `ref(x)` |
748: | `useRef(x)` | `let x = y` (non-reactive) or `ref(x)` if template needs it |
749: | `useEffect(() => { ... }, [deps])` | `watch([deps], () => { ... })` or `watchEffect()` |
750: | `useLayoutEffect` | `onMounted` + `watch({ flush: 'pre' })` |
751: | `useCallback(fn, [deps])` | plain function (Vue doesn't re-create closures) |
752: | `useMemo(fn, [deps])` | `computed(fn)` |
753: | `AnimatePresence` + `motion.div` | `<Transition>` + manual opacity/transform |
754: | `animate(from, to, opts)` | `animate(from, to, opts)` from `motion` package (same API) |
755: | `sonnerToast.dismiss(id)` | `emit('dismiss', id)` |
756: | `subscribeContainerHovered(cb)` | `watch(containerHovered, cb)` |
757: 
758: ### Section-by-section port:
759: 
760: **7a. Template refs & non-reactive state:**
761: - `wrapperRef`, `pathRef`, `headerRef`, `contentRef` → `useTemplateRef<HTMLDivElement>()` or `ref<HTMLElement | null>(null)`
762: - `morphTRef`, `aDims`, `dimsRef`, `expandedDimsRef` → plain `let` variables (non-reactive, only used in imperative animation code)
763: - Animation controllers (`morphCtrl`, `pillResizeCtrl`, etc.) → plain `let` variables
764: 
765: **7b. Reactive state:**
766: - `showBody`, `dismissing`, `hovered`, `actionSuccess`, `progressKey` → `ref()`
767: - `dims` (triggers effects) → `ref({ pw: 0, bw: 0, th: 0 })`
768: 
769: **7c. Computed:**
770: - `effectiveTitle`, `effectivePhase`, `effectiveDescription`, `effectiveAction` → `computed()`
771: - `isExpanded`, `isLoading`, `hasDescription`, `hasAction` → `computed()`
772: - `isRight`, `isCenter` → `computed()` reading from `_config`
773: - `useSpring`, `bounceVal`, `showProgress` → `computed()` merging props + presets + config
774: 
775: **7d. `flush()` and `measure()`:**
776: Direct copy from React. These are plain functions that read refs and write to DOM. No React/Vue dependency.
777: 
778: **7e. Morph animation (Phase 2 in React):**
779: `watch(showBody, (val) => { ... })` — drives morph 0→1 on true, 1→0 on false. Uses `animate()` from `motion` package.
780: 
781: **7f. Pre-dismiss timer:**
782: Delegate to `useToastTimer` composable.
783: 
784: **7g. Re-expand on hover:**
785: `watch([hovered, containerHovered], ...)` — if dismissing and now hovered, stop collapse, re-expand.
786: 
787: **7h. Error shake:**
788: `watch(() => props.toast.phase, (newPhase, oldPhase) => { ... })` — trigger shake animation on error transition.
789: 
790: **7i. Landing squish:**
791: `triggerLandingSquish()` — same imperative function, called from morph watchers.
792: 
793: **7j. Header elastic squish:**
794: `watch([showBody, dismissing, actionSuccess], ...)` — squish header during expand/collapse.
795: 
796: **7k. Icon transition:**
797: Replace `<AnimatePresence mode="wait"><motion.div>` with `<Transition mode="out-in">` using CSS opacity/scale.
798: 
799: **7l. Body content (description, action, timestamp):**
800: Replace `<AnimatePresence>` + `<motion.div>` with `<Transition>` components for fade-in/out.
801: 
802: **7m. Dismiss from container:**
803: Instead of `sonnerToast.dismiss(toastId)`, emit `dismiss` event. ToastContainer handles removal from `_toasts`.
804: 
805: **7n. Height reporting:**
806: On mount and after dimension changes, emit `heightChange` so ToastContainer can update stacking.
807: 
808: **Verification**: Component renders correctly, morph animations work, dismiss lifecycle completes.
809: 
810: ---
811: 
812: ## Phase 8: GooeyToaster.vue
813: 
814: **Goal**: Top-level provider component. Syncs props to `_config`, renders `<ToastContainer>` + `<AriaLiveAnnouncer>`.
815: 
816: ### Props:
817: All `GooeyToasterProps` fields (same as React minus Sonner-specific ones).
818:

834:   offset: '24px',
835:   theme: 'light',
836:   visibleToasts: 3,
837:   swipeToDismiss: true,

1: import { useEffect } from 'react'
2: import { Toaster } from 'sonner'
3: import type { GooeyToasterProps } from '../types'
4: import { animationPresets } from '../presets'
5: import { setGooeyPosition, setGooeyDir, setGooeySpring, setGooeyBounce, setGooeyVisibleToasts, setContainerHovered, setGooeySwipeToDismiss, setGooeyCloseOnEscape, setGooeyTheme, setGooeyMaxQueue, setGooeyQueueOverflow, setGooeyShowProgress, setGooeyCloseButton } from '../context'
6: import { gooeyToast, _getMostRecentActiveId } from '../gooey-toast'
7: import { AriaLiveAnnouncer } from './AriaLiveAnnouncer'
8: 
9: export function GooeyToaster({
10:   position = 'bottom-right',
11:   duration,
12:   gap = 14,
13:   offset = '24px',
14:   theme = 'light',
15:   toastOptions,
16:   expand,
17:   closeButton,
18:   richColors,
19:   visibleToasts,
20:   dir,
21:   preset,
22:   spring,
23:   bounce,
24:   swipeToDismiss = true,
25:   closeOnEscape = true,
26:   maxQueue = Infinity,
27:   queueOverflow = 'drop-oldest',
28:   showProgress = false,
29: }: GooeyToasterProps) {
30:   const presetConfig = preset ? animationPresets[preset] : undefined
31:   const resolvedSpring = spring ?? presetConfig?.spring ?? true
32:   const resolvedBounce = bounce ?? presetConfig?.bounce
33: 
34:   useEffect(() => {
35:     setGooeyPosition(position)
36:   }, [position])
37: 
38:   useEffect(() => {
39:     setGooeyDir(dir ?? 'ltr')
40:   }, [dir])
41: 
42:   useEffect(() => {
43:     setGooeyTheme(theme)
44:   }, [theme])
45: 
46:   useEffect(() => {
47:     setGooeySpring(resolvedSpring)
48:   }, [resolvedSpring])
49: 
50:   useEffect(() => {
51:     setGooeyBounce(resolvedBounce)
52:   }, [resolvedBounce])
53: 
54:   useEffect(() => {
55:     setGooeySwipeToDismiss(swipeToDismiss)
56:   }, [swipeToDismiss])
57: 
58:   useEffect(() => {
59:     setGooeyCloseOnEscape(closeOnEscape)
60:   }, [closeOnEscape])
61: 
62:   useEffect(() => {
63:     if (!closeOnEscape) return
64: 
65:     const handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
66:       if (e.key === 'Escape') {
67:         const recentId = _getMostRecentActiveId()
68:         if (recentId != null) {
69:           gooeyToast.dismiss(recentId)
70:         }
71:       }
72:     }
73: 
74:     document.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown)
75:     return () => document.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown)
76:   }, [closeOnEscape])
77: 
78:   useEffect(() => {
79:     setGooeyVisibleToasts(visibleToasts ?? 3)
80:   }, [visibleToasts])
81: 
82:   useEffect(() => {
83:     setGooeyMaxQueue(maxQueue)
84:   }, [maxQueue])
85: 
86:   useEffect(() => {
87:     setGooeyQueueOverflow(queueOverflow)
88:   }, [queueOverflow])
89: 
90:   useEffect(() => {
91:     setGooeyShowProgress(showProgress)
92:   }, [showProgress])
93: 
94:   useEffect(() => {
95:     setGooeyCloseButton(closeButton ?? false)
96:   }, [closeButton])
97: 
98:   // Detect hover on the Sonner container and broadcast to all GooeyToast instances.
99:   // Uses Sonner's `data-expanded` attribute (set per-toast <li>) as the hover signal
100:   // rather than raw mouseenter/mouseleave on the <ol>. This is more reliable because
101:   // Sonner manages it with onMouseEnter + onMouseMove + onMouseLeave, and it survives
102:   // <ol> remounts (all toasts dismissed then new ones appear).
103:   useEffect(() => {
104:     let expandObs: MutationObserver | null = null
105:     let currentOl: HTMLElement | null = null
106: 
107:     const syncFromExpanded = (ol: HTMLElement) => {
108:       const anyExpanded = ol.querySelector('[data-sonner-toast][data-expanded="true"]') !== null
109:       setContainerHovered(anyExpanded)
110:     }
111: 
112:     const attach = (ol: HTMLElement) => {
113:       if (ol === currentOl) return
114:       expandObs?.disconnect()
115:       currentOl = ol
116:       expandObs = new MutationObserver(() => syncFromExpanded(ol))
117:       expandObs.observe(ol, { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['data-expanded'], subtree: true })
118:       syncFromExpanded(ol)
119:     }
120: 
121:     const el = document.querySelector<HTMLElement>('[data-sonner-toaster]')
122:     if (el) attach(el)
123: 
124:     // Re-discover if the <ol> is remounted (e.g. all toasts dismissed then new ones appear).
125:     // Debounce via rAF to coalesce rapid DOM mutations (e.g. multiple toasts mounting).
126:     let bodyRafId = 0
127:     const bodyObs = new MutationObserver(() => {
128:       if (bodyRafId) return
129:       bodyRafId = requestAnimationFrame(() => {
130:         bodyRafId = 0
131:         const found = document.querySelector<HTMLElement>('[data-sonner-toaster]')
132:         if (found) {
133:           attach(found)
134:         } else if (currentOl) {
135:           expandObs?.disconnect()
136:           currentOl = null
137:           setContainerHovered(false)
138:         }
139:       })
140:     })
141:     bodyObs.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true })
142: 
143:     return () => {
144:       if (bodyRafId) cancelAnimationFrame(bodyRafId)
145:       bodyObs.disconnect()
146:       expandObs?.disconnect()
147:       setContainerHovered(false)
148:     }
149:   }, [])
150: 
151:   useEffect(() => {
152:     if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'development') return
153: 
154:     const el = document.createElement('div')
155:     el.setAttribute('data-gooey-toast-css', '')
156:     el.style.position = 'absolute'
157:     el.style.width = '0'
158:     el.style.height = '0'
159:     el.style.overflow = 'hidden'
160:     el.style.pointerEvents = 'none'
161:     document.body.appendChild(el)
162: 
163:     const value = getComputedStyle(el).getPropertyValue('--gooey-toast')
164:     document.body.removeChild(el)
165: 
166:     if (!value) {
167:       console.warn(
168:         '[gooey-toast] Styles not found. Make sure to import the CSS:\n\n' +
169:         '  import "goey-toast/styles.css";\n'
170:       )
171:     }
172:   }, [])
173: 
174:   return (
175:     <>
176:       <Toaster
177:         position={position}
178:         duration={duration}
179:         gap={gap}
180:         offset={offset}
181:         theme={theme}
182:         toastOptions={{ unstyled: true, ...toastOptions }}
183:         expand={expand}
184:         closeButton={false}
185:         richColors={richColors}
186:         visibleToasts={99}
187:         dir={dir}
188:       />
189:       <AriaLiveAnnouncer />
190:     </>
191:   )
192: }

<type>file</type>
<content>
1: import { ref, type VNode } from 'vue'
2: import { _config, announce, type AriaLivePoliteness } from './context'
3: import type {
4:   GooeyToastOptions,
5:   GooeyPromiseData,
6:   GooeyToastPhase,
7:   GooeyToastType,
8:   GooeyToastAction,
9:   GooeyToastClassNames,
10:   GooeyToastTimings,
11:   GooeyToastUpdateOptions,
12:   DismissFilter,
13: } from './types'
14: import type { AnimationPresetName } from './presets'
15: 
16: function getAnnouncePoliteness(type: GooeyToastType): AriaLivePoliteness {
17:   return type === 'error' || type === 'warning' ? 'assertive' : 'polite'
18: }
19: 
20: function buildAnnouncementMessage(title: string, description?: VNode | string): string {
21:   if (!description || typeof description !== 'string') return title
22:   return `${title}: ${description}`
23: }
24: 
25: export interface InternalToast {
26:   id: string | number
27:   title: string
28:   type: GooeyToastType
29:   phase: GooeyToastPhase
30:   description?: VNode | string
31:   action?: GooeyToastAction
32:   icon?: VNode | string
33:   duration?: number
34:   classNames?: GooeyToastClassNames
35:   fillColor?: string
36:   borderColor?: string
37:   borderWidth?: number
38:   timing?: GooeyToastTimings
39:   preset?: AnimationPresetName
40:   spring?: boolean
41:   bounce?: number
42:   showProgress?: boolean
43:   showTimestamp?: boolean
44:   _onDismiss?: (id: string | number) => void
45:   _onAutoClose?: (id: string | number) => void
46: }
47: 
48: export const _toasts = ref<InternalToast[]>([])
49: 
50: const _queue: Array<{ id: string | number; type: GooeyToastType; toast: InternalToast }> = []
51: const _autoCloseFlags = new Set<string | number>()
52: const _manualDismissFlags = new Set<string | number>()
53: 
54: export function _markAutoClose(id: string | number) {
55:   _autoCloseFlags.add(id)
56: }
57: 
58: export function _resetQueue() {
59:   _toasts.value = []
60:   _queue.length = 0
61:   _autoCloseFlags.clear()
62:   _manualDismissFlags.clear()
63: }
64: 
65: export function _getMostRecentActiveId(): string | number | undefined {
66:   const toasts = _toasts.value
67:   return toasts.length > 0 ? toasts[toasts.length - 1].id : undefined
68: }
69: 
70: function _processQueue() {
71:   const max = _config.visibleToasts
72:   while (_queue.length > 0 && _toasts.value.length < max) {
73:     const next = _queue.shift()!
74:     _toasts.value.push(next.toast)
75:   }
76: }
77: 
78: function _enqueue(entry: { id: string | number; type: GooeyToastType; toast: InternalToast }): boolean {
79:   const maxQueue = _config.maxQueue
80:   const overflow = _config.queueOverflow
81:   if (_queue.length >= maxQueue) {
82:     if (overflow === 'drop-newest') return false
83:     _queue.shift()
84:   }
85:   _queue.push(entry)
86:   return true
87: }
88: 
89: export function _onToastDismissed(id: string | number) {
90:   const idx = _toasts.value.findIndex(t => t.id === id)
91:   if (idx === -1) return
92: 
93:   const toast = _toasts.value[idx]
94:   _toasts.value.splice(idx, 1)
95: 
96:   const isAutoClose = _autoCloseFlags.has(id) || !_manualDismissFlags.has(id)
97:   if (isAutoClose && toast._onAutoClose) {
98:     try { toast._onAutoClose(id) } catch { /* callback errors must not break queue */ }
99:   }
100:   if (toast._onDismiss) {
101:     try { toast._onDismiss(id) } catch { /* callback errors must not break queue */ }
102:   }
103: 
104:   _autoCloseFlags.delete(id)
105:   _manualDismissFlags.delete(id)
106:   _processQueue()
107: }
108: 
109: function updateGooeyToast(id: string | number, options: GooeyToastUpdateOptions) {
110:   const toast = _toasts.value.find(t => t.id === id)
111:   if (!toast) return
112: 
113:   if (options.title !== undefined) toast.title = options.title
114:   if (options.description !== undefined) toast.description = options.description
115:   if (options.type !== undefined) {
116:     toast.type = options.type
117:     toast.phase = options.type
118:   }
119:   if (options.action !== undefined) toast.action = options.action
120:   if ('icon' in options) toast.icon = options.icon ?? undefined
121:   if (options.showTimestamp !== undefined) toast.showTimestamp = options.showTimestamp
122: 
123:   if (options.title !== undefined) {
124:     announce(
125:       buildAnnouncementMessage(options.title, options.description),
126:       options.type ? getAnnouncePoliteness(options.type) : 'polite',
127:     )
128:   }
129: }
130: 
131: function createGooeyToast(
132:   title: string,
133:   type: GooeyToastType,
134:   options?: GooeyToastOptions,
135: ) {
136:   const toastId = options?.id ?? Math.random().toString(36).slice(2)
137: 
138:   const toast: InternalToast = {
139:     id: toastId,
140:     title,
141:     type,
142:     phase: type,
143:     description: options?.description,
144:     action: options?.action,
145:     icon: options?.icon,
146:     duration: options?.timing?.displayDuration ?? options?.duration,
147:     classNames: options?.classNames,
148:     fillColor: options?.fillColor,
149:     borderColor: options?.borderColor,
150:     borderWidth: options?.borderWidth,
151:     timing: options?.timing,
152:     preset: options?.preset,
153:     spring: options?.spring,
154:     bounce: options?.bounce,
155:     showProgress: options?.showProgress,
156:     showTimestamp: options?.showTimestamp,
157:     _onDismiss: options?.onDismiss,
158:     _onAutoClose: options?.onAutoClose,
159:   }
160: 
161:   announce(
162:     buildAnnouncementMessage(title, options?.description),
163:     getAnnouncePoliteness(type),
164:   )
165: 
166:   if (_toasts.value.length < _config.visibleToasts) {
167:     _toasts.value.push(toast)
168:   } else {
169:     _enqueue({ id: toastId, type, toast })
170:   }
171: 
172:   return toastId
173: }
174: 
175: function dismissGooeyToast(idOrFilter?: string | number | DismissFilter) {
176:   if (idOrFilter != null && typeof idOrFilter === 'object') {
177:     const filterTypes = Array.isArray(idOrFilter.type) ? idOrFilter.type : [idOrFilter.type]
178:     const typesSet = new Set<GooeyToastType>(filterTypes)
179: 
180:     for (let i = _queue.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
181:       if (typesSet.has(_queue[i].type)) {
182:         _queue.splice(i, 1)
183:       }
184:     }
185: 
186:     const toRemove = _toasts.value.filter(t => typesSet.has(t.type))
187:     for (const t of toRemove) {
188:       _manualDismissFlags.add(t.id)
189:       _onToastDismissed(t.id)
190:     }
191:   } else if (idOrFilter != null) {
192:     const qIdx = _queue.findIndex(q => q.id === idOrFilter)
193:     if (qIdx !== -1) {
194:       _queue.splice(qIdx, 1)
195:       return
196:     }
197:     _manualDismissFlags.add(idOrFilter)
198:     _onToastDismissed(idOrFilter)
199:   } else {
200:     for (const t of _toasts.value) {
201:       _manualDismissFlags.add(t.id)
202:     }
203:     _queue.length = 0
204:     const all = [..._toasts.value]
205:     _toasts.value = []
206:     for (const t of all) {
207:       const isAutoClose = _autoCloseFlags.has(t.id) || !_manualDismissFlags.has(t.id)
208:       if (isAutoClose && t._onAutoClose) {
209:         try { t._onAutoClose(t.id) } catch { /* noop */ }
210:       }
211:       if (t._onDismiss) {
212:         try { t._onDismiss(t.id) } catch { /* noop */ }
213:       }
214:       _autoCloseFlags.delete(t.id)
215:       _manualDismissFlags.delete(t.id)
216:     }
217:   }
218: }
219: 
220: export const gooeyToast = Object.assign(
221:   (title: string, options?: GooeyToastOptions) =>
222:     createGooeyToast(title, 'default', options),
223:   {
224:     success: (title: string, options?: GooeyToastOptions) =>
225:       createGooeyToast(title, 'success', options),
226:     error: (title: string, options?: GooeyToastOptions) =>
227:       createGooeyToast(title, 'error', options),
228:     warning: (title: string, options?: GooeyToastOptions) =>
229:       createGooeyToast(title, 'warning', options),
230:     info: (title: string, options?: GooeyToastOptions) =>
231:       createGooeyToast(title, 'info', options),
232:     promise: <T,>(promise: Promise<T>, data: GooeyPromiseData<T>) => {
233:       const id = Math.random().toString(36).slice(2)
234: 
235:       announce(buildAnnouncementMessage(data.loading, data.description?.loading), 'polite')
236: 
237:       const toast: InternalToast = {
238:         id,
239:         title: data.loading,
240:         type: 'info',
241:         phase: 'loading',
242:         description: data.description?.loading,
243:         classNames: data.classNames,
244:         fillColor: data.fillColor,
245:         borderColor: data.borderColor,
246:         borderWidth: data.borderWidth,
247:         timing: data.timing,
248:         preset: data.preset,
249:         spring: data.spring,
250:         bounce: data.bounce,
251:         showTimestamp: data.showTimestamp,
252:         _onDismiss: data.onDismiss,
253:         _onAutoClose: data.onAutoClose,
254:       }
255: 
256:       if (_toasts.value.length < _config.visibleToasts) {
257:         _toasts.value.push(toast)
258:       } else {
259:         _enqueue({ id, type: 'info', toast })
260:       }
261: 
262:       promise
263:         .then((result) => {
264:           const existing = _toasts.value.find(t => t.id === id)
265:           if (!existing) return
266:           const desc = typeof data.description?.success === 'function'
267:             ? data.description.success(result)
268:             : data.description?.success
269:           const resolvedTitle = typeof data.success === 'function'
270:             ? data.success(result)
271:             : data.success
272:           existing.title = resolvedTitle
273:           existing.description = desc
274:           existing.action = data.action?.success
275:           existing.phase = 'success'
276:           existing.type = 'success'
277:           announce(buildAnnouncementMessage(resolvedTitle, desc), 'polite')
278:         })
279:         .catch((err) => {
280:           const existing = _toasts.value.find(t => t.id === id)
281:           if (!existing) return
282:           const desc = typeof data.description?.error === 'function'
283:             ? data.description.error(err)
284:             : data.description?.error
285:           const resolvedTitle = typeof data.error === 'function' ? data.error(err) : data.error
286:           existing.title = resolvedTitle
287:           existing.description = desc
288:           existing.action = data.action?.error
289:           existing.phase = 'error'
290:           existing.type = 'error'
291:           announce(buildAnnouncementMessage(resolvedTitle, desc), 'assertive')
292:         })
293: 
294:       return id
295:     },
296:     dismiss: dismissGooeyToast,
297:     update: updateGooeyToast,
298:   },
299: )

(End of file - total 299 lines)
</content>

1: import type { VNode } from 'vue'
2: import type { AnimationPresetName } from './presets'
3: 
4: export type GooeyToastType = 'default' | 'success' | 'error' | 'warning' | 'info'
5: 
6: export type ToastPosition = 'top-left' | 'top-center' | 'top-right' | 'bottom-left' | 'bottom-center' | 'bottom-right'
7: 
8: export interface GooeyToastTimings {
9:   displayDuration?: number
10: }
11: 
12: export interface GooeyToastClassNames {
13:   wrapper?: string
14:   content?: string
15:   header?: string
16:   title?: string
17:   icon?: string
18:   description?: string
19:   actionWrapper?: string
20:   actionButton?: string
21: }
22: 
23: export interface GooeyToastAction {
24:   label: string
25:   onClick: () => void

{
  "content": "<script setup lang=\"ts\">\nimport { computed, reactive } from 'vue'\nimport { _toasts, _onToastDismissed } from '../gooey-toast'\nimport { containerHovered } from '../context'\nimport type { ToastPosition } from '../types'\nimport ToastErrorBoundary from './ToastErrorBoundary.vue'\nimport GooeyToast from './GooeyToast.vue'\n\nconst props = withDefaults(defineProps<{\n  position: ToastPosition\n  gap: number\n  offset: number | string\n  theme: 'light' | 'dark'\n  dir: 'ltr' | 'rtl'\n  visibleToasts: number\n}>(), {\n  position: 'bottom-right',\n  gap: 14,\n  offset: '24px',\n  theme: 'light',\n  dir: 'ltr',\n  visibleToasts: 3,\n})\n\nconst heights = reactive(new Map<string | number, number>())\n\nfunction handleHeightChange(id: string | number, height: number) {\n  heights.set(id, height)\n}\n\nfunction handleDismiss(id: string | number) {\n  heights.delete(id)\n  _onToastDismissed(id)\n}\n\nfunction onMouseEnter() {\n  containerHovered.value = true\n}\n\nfunction onMouseLeave() {\n  containerHovered.value = false\n}\n\nconst isBottom = computed(() => props.position.startsWith('bottom'))\n\nconst expandedHeight = computed(() => {\n  let total = 0\n  const toasts = _toasts.value\n  for (let i = 0; i < toasts.length; i++) {\n    total += heights.get(toasts[i].id) ?? 0\n    if (i < toasts.length - 1) total += props.gap\n  }\n  return total\n})\n\nconst containerStyle = computed(() => {\n  const off = typeof props.offset === 'number' ? `${props.offset}px` : props.offset\n  const style: Record<string, string> = {\n    position: 'fixed',\n    zIndex: '999999',\n    listStyle: 'none',\n    padding: '0',\n    margin: '0',\n    width: '356px',\n    height: `${expandedHeight.value}px`,\n    pointerEvents: _toasts.value.length > 0 ? 'auto' : 'none',\n  }\n\n  if (isBottom.value) style.bottom = off\n  else style.top = off\n\n  if (props.position.endsWith('right')) style.right = off\n  else if (props.position.endsWith('left')) style.left = off\n  else {\n    style.left = '50%'\n    style.transform = 'translateX(-50%)'\n  }\n\n  return style\n})\n\nfunction getItemStyle(index: number): Record<string, string> {\n  const toasts = _toasts.value\n  const total = toasts.length\n  const indexFromFront = total - 1 - index\n  const hovered = containerHovered.value\n\n  let cumulativeOffset = 0\n  for (let i = total - 1; i > index; i--) {\n    cumulativeOffset += (heights.get(toasts[i].id) ?? 0) + props.gap\n  }\n\n  const visible = indexFromFront < props.visibleToasts || hovered\n  const scale = hovered ? 1 : Math.max(0.8, 1 - indexFromFront * 0.05)\n  const direction = isBottom.value ? -1 : 1\n  const yOffset = direction * cumulativeOffset\n\n  return {\n    position: 'absolute',\n    ...(isBottom.value ? { bottom: '0' } : { top: '0' }),\n    left: '0',\n    right: '0',\n    transform: `translate3d(0, ${yOffset}px, 0) scale(${scale})`,\n    transformOrigin: isBottom.value ? 'bottom center' : 'top center',\n    transition: 'transform 0.3s ease, opacity 0.3s ease',\n    opacity: visible ? '1' : '0',\n    zIndex: String(total - indexFromFront),\n    pointerEvents: visible ? 'auto' : 'none',\n  }\n}\n</script>\n\n<template>\n  <Teleport to=\"body\">\n    <ol\n      data-gooey-toaster\n      :data-position=\"position\"\n      :data-theme=\"theme\"\n      :data-dir=\"dir\"\n      :style=\"containerStyle\"\n      @mouseenter=\"onMouseEnter\"\n      @mouseleave=\"onMouseLeave\"\n    >\n      <li\n        v-for=\"(toast, index) in _toasts\"\n        :key=\"toast.id\"\n        :style=\"getItemStyle(index)\"\n      >\n        <ToastErrorBoundary>\n          <GooeyToast\n            :toast=\"toast\"\n            :toast-id=\"toast.id\"\n            @dismiss=\"handleDismiss\"\n            @height-change=\"handleHeightChange\"\n          />\n        </ToastErrorBoundary>\n      </li>\n    </ol>\n  </Teleport>\n</template>\n",

}

1: import { useRef, useState, useEffect, useLayoutEffect as useLayoutEffectOrig, useCallback, useMemo, type FC, type ReactNode } from 'react'
2: import { motion, AnimatePresence, animate } from 'framer-motion'
3: import { toast as sonnerToast } from 'sonner'
4: import type { GooeyToastAction, GooeyToastClassNames, GooeyToastPhase, GooeyToastTimings, GooeyToastType } from '../types'
5: import type { AnimationPresetName } from '../presets'
6: import { animationPresets } from '../presets'
7: import { getGooeyPosition, getGooeyDir, getGooeySpring, getGooeyBounce, getGooeySwipeToDismiss, getGooeyTheme, getGooeyShowProgress, getGooeyCloseButton, subscribeContainerHovered, getContainerHovered } from '../context'
8: import { DefaultIcon, SuccessIcon, ErrorIcon, WarningIcon, InfoIcon, SpinnerIcon } from '../icons'
9: import { usePrefersReducedMotion } from '../usePrefersReducedMotion'

11: 
12: // SSR-safe useLayoutEffect: avoids React warning when rendering on the server.
13: // Falls back to useEffect during SSR (no DOM to measure anyway).
14: const useIsomorphicLayoutEffect =
15:   typeof window !== 'undefined' ? useLayoutEffectOrig : useEffect
16: 
17: export interface GooeyToastProps {
18:   title: string
19:   description?: ReactNode
20:   type: GooeyToastType
21:   action?: GooeyToastAction
